name: Anna Bukowski, tinaforminnesota.com
subject: Update on our contribution goal:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Did you see Tina's email?

| Did you see Tina's email? We've set a giant goal of reaching 50,000 contributions in just 48 hours, and we need your help to reach it. [**Pitch in towards this big goal before we hit our deadline at midnight tomorrow. Every contribution sends a message about the strength of this team.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b98/3876146569/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730PM_em") If we fall short, it will send a terrible message to Republicans like Mitch McConnell who will think this campaign is weak and use it to encourage even more special interest money to flood into Minnesota. And with the fate of the Senate on the line, we can't afford to miss this goal by even one contribution. Counting on you, Anna Bukowski
Digital Director ****** FORWARDED MESSAGE ****** [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b98/3876146569/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730PM_em") Friend, My team just updated me on the numbers, and I wanted to share how close we are to a special milestone. **We 're just 1,901 away from 50,000 grassroots contributions. Now, I know this will be tough, but I think we can hit 50,000 by midnight tomorrow. [Can I count on you to make your first contribution now so we can reach this big goal?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b98/3876146569/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730PM_em")** This campaign has never been about how much you give, but that you are invested and part of this movement. **And you are showing with every contribution that you will be the difference in keeping this seat blue -- not the super PACs or special interests.** I know sometimes grassroots donations seem small, but when thousands of people come together to give $5, $10, or even $1 at a time, it creates something truly special. That's how we've built such a powerful campaign with an average grassroots contribution of just $26. Now I have to ask one more time because this goal is big and we don't have much time to hit it: **Will you chip in now so we can hit 50,000 contributions before midnight tomorrow? Every contribution, even $1, gets us closer to this goal and sends a message about the power of our grassroots campaign:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b99/3876146569/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$26 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b9a/3876146569/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=26")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b9b/3876146569/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b9c/3876146569/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b9d/3876146569/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730PM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b9e/3876146569/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730PM_em-exp")
---
Thank you for everything,
Tina

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7ea/c1f7015/6ad749c8/11427b9f/3876146569/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Jenny Nadicksbernd
subject: July is the hardest month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Over my years working to raise money for Democratic candidates, I've seen a pattern: Fundraising always slows down in the summer. ----------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

Over my years working to raise money for Democratic candidates, I've seen a pattern: **Fundraising always slows down in the summer.**

This year has been no different. But here's the thing: Forward progress doesn't take the summer off - and neither do campaigns. [In three months,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12da/3e0906/6e10c014/3e353dd7/3289257401/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+In+three+months&utm_campaign=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&source=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND") people across the country will head to the polls and decide the outcome of what could be the most important election of our generation.

We can't afford to fall short of our fundraising goals this close to Election Day, but I'm worried we might. With just one day to go, we're still $6,700 away from hitting our July goal. **We can 't afford to miss this goal: [Chip in any amount to close the gap before the month ends >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12da/3e0906/6e10c014/3e353dd6/3289257401/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in++if+contributionhpc+or+hpc++hpc+&utm_campaign=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&source=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12da/3e0906/6e10c014/3e353dd5/3289257401/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&source=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12da/3e0906/6e10c014/3e353dd4/3289257401/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&source=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND")
---
| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12da/3e0906/6e10c014/3e353c2b/3289257401/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND_100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&source=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12da/3e0906/6e10c014/3e353c2a/3289257401/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&source=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND")
---
**Missing this goal would affect our entire campaign program.** If we want to win in November, we have to keep fighting regardless of whether our fundraising dips. But if we fail, we'll have to fight with fewer resources, putting a bigger strain on every member of this team - _including Tim._

[Don't let that happen. Donate any amount now >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12da/3e0906/6e10c014/3e353c29/3289257401/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Donrsquot+let+that+happen+Donate++if+con&utm_campaign=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&source=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND")

Thanks,

Jenny

Jenny Nadicksbernd
Finance Director
Tim Kaine 2018

[**MAKE YOUR DONATION MONTHLY**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12da/3e0906/6e10c014/3e353c28/3289257401/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-recurring-fund?refcode=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&amount=25&recurring=4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+MAKE+YOUR+DONATION+MONTHLY&utm_campaign=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&source=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12da/3e0906/6e10c014/3e353c22/3289257401/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND&source=20180730_2_FR_JN_EOM-Jenny-LDND")

subject: crunching the numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Team, we had a busy weekend here at O'Halleran HQ.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633847/1a8421e1/1a539fade/4880278e/1107934712/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
_Team, we had a busy weekend here at O 'Halleran HQ._ **Our July fundraising deadline is tomorrow** \-- so we were in overdrive, making calls and crunching the numbers. **By my count, we 're running $2,021 behind our online fundraising goal, with a day to make up the difference. [Can you make a donation today so we can make up the lost ground?](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.30_b2_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.30_b2_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Team, as Tom's finance director, my job is to make sure that this campaign has the resources we need to communicate with voters all across our district.

Tom is fighting for Arizona families in Congress every day, standing up for our rural communities and holding the Trump Administration accountable. But he's been named THE MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the House, so his re-election is far from guaranteed.

**I 'm confident that Arizona voters will recognize Tom's strong record at the ballot box in November -- _but we need to make sure that they know about the work he 's doing for them in Washington._**

That means running ads on TV, carrying out a robust field program, and traveling all around our district -- and that's going to cost a lot of money. We've budgeted out every dollar, and we'll have enough, _but only if we reach this goal tomorrow._

**[So, what do you say, can I count on you to chip in to our campaign today?](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.30_b2_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Yes! Count me in>>](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.30_b2_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thanks,

Lindsay Coleman
Finance Director

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.30_b2_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

subject: Following up

body:
Did you see Chris’ message yesterday? Our campaign faces a major fundraising deadline at the end of the month and it has never been more important. Cindy Hyde-Smith is being bankrolled by one of Hillary Clinton’s biggest donors to the tune of $250,000! Peter, Did you see Chris’ message yesterday? Our campaign faces a major fundraising deadline at the end of the month and it has never been more important. Cindy Hyde-Smith is being bankrolled by one of Hillary Clinton’s biggest donors to the tune of $250,000! That shouldn’t come as a surprise -- given that Cindy Hyde-Smith is a lifelong Democrat who voted for Hillary Clinton -- but it’s real money that we have to compete against. Click here or use the secure link below to help Chris fight back against this dirty money by chipping in right now to the Conservative Money Bomb! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] Show Cindy Hyde-Smith that a true conservative wouldn’t take money from a California liberal. Secure donate link: https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/ [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] Thank you, Team McDaniel ---------- Forwarded message ----------

From: Chris McDaniel

Date: Sun, Jul 29, 2018

Subject: Cindy Hyde-Smith: Paid for by California Dems Friend, We’re now not only fighting against the Washington establishment, but also the radical Democrats bankrolling our opponents. Financial reports have exposed liberal billionaire George Soros maxing out his contributions to my far-left Democrat opponent Mike Espy, while California billionaire Sean Parker contributed $250,000 donation to fellow liberal Cindy Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC. Soros and Parker were two of Hillary Clinton’s biggest donors, together donating millions of dollars to help her defeat President Trump in 2016. Now they’re trying to buy Mississippi’s election. Call me crazy, but I think this election should be decided by Mississippi voters -- not California Democrats. That’s why we’ve launched a Conservative Money Bomb -- we need to raise $25,000 by the end of the month to match some of the funds that radical out-of-state Democrats are funneling into our state to buy our election. Chip in today and fight back against the radical Democrats who are trying to silence our voice and buy our election! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] Cindy Hyde-Smith and Mike Espy are cut from the same cloth. They both voted for Hillary Clinton, and are turning to liberal California billionaires to try and defeat a true conservative. Allow me to be very clear about this: liberals like Parker and Soros don’t care about Mississippi or our values. All they care about is defeating conservatives around the country. Help me fight back against this dirty money and show that Mississippi’s conservatives won’t accept a Senator who is bankrolled by far-left liberals. Chip in and support our campaign today. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] Chip in $10 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] Chip in $25 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] Chip in $50 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] Chip in $100 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] Mississippi deserves a Senator who will works for Mississippi, not radical west-coast liberals. Remember Mississippi, Chris McDaniel P.S - Both of our opponents in this race are being bankrolled by radical Democrats like Sean Parker and George Soros. The people of Mississippi expect their leaders to stand up and fight back against those radical Democrats, not take money from them. Chip in to our Conservative Money Bomb today and show Cindy Hyde-Smith and Mike Espy that Mississippi wants a true conservative representing us, not someone bankrolled by west-coast billionaires! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] DONATE [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180730_EoM2&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180730_EoM2] [https://twitter.com/CMForUSSenate]

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: That day will NEVER come
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
They’re dreaming! |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=70c4274b1aee09df9df5a8a5ab0d6d4caa57ad6be007aa45812e0cec85effb6d1813bdb2fe25c5313cb0ceaa7c156b41b371bc471dd971af)**

Friend,

The media hopes their coverage of me will get so nasty that I'll give up from our fight.

THAT DAY WILL _**NEVER**_ COME.

I promised to fight for you -- and there's nothing our enemies could ever do to make me walk away from that promise.

_We are fighting for America. There 's no greater honor in the world._

But we must stay vigilant. We've got a critical end-of-month goal at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT that we have to crush. It's the people vs. the swamp -- and the people MUST win.

name: Anthony Pardal
subject: Fwd: Real jobs for Floridians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| Friends and Neighbors -- Just wanted to make sure you saw Jeremy's most recent email. Because of our amazing, dedicated supporters, we are very close to reaching our July goal! Every dollar helps spread Jeremy's message to voters from the Panhandle to the Everglades: as our next CFO, **Jeremy will fight for everyday Floridians and build an innovation-centered economy, prioritizing entrepreneurial endeavors and job growth in Florida.** ** ** **But we can 't get there without your help.** **[Can you make a donation of $20.18 or more by midnight to help send Jeremy to the cabinet? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/OjD-N5eSm__-NaiMHXB-SLbvMplY7LJU8Ib0ltk6PqA=/1G88993fhpwm9bXxDrJq-JuEKtYhRICyEASwVm0fSyM=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all you do, **Anthony** \- Anthony Pardal, Campaign Manager - Jeremy Ring for Florida CFO \---------- Forwarded message ---------- [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OjD-N5eSm__-NaiMHXB-SLbvMplY7LJU8Ib0ltk6PqA=/gH3QKLfDmkUbZKvp717EZkgjQDjfZvN8Zf3m3Z_hdWA=) All too often, Floridians leave our state after achieving their education or getting to a certain point in their career. This is not because they no longer love this beautiful place we call home, but because they cannot find a job in their field - or sometimes at all - that can compete with wages offered other states. Not only does this uproot these individuals and their families, **it takes very valuable players out of our local and statewide job markets. ** **But it doesn 't have to be that way -- Innovation can create real long-term high-paying jobs for Floridians. And that's not just some talking point, because programs that I have started have created an economic impact of over $1 BILLION for the state. ** During my ten years in the Florida Senate, I helped to lay the foundation for an innovation economy by creating and fostering initiatives such as the Florida Institute of Commercialization, which helps entrepreneurs with business fundamentals - i.e. writing business plans - and helps them to secure company funding to create the leading products and companies of tomorrow. The Chief Financial Officer (CFO) plays a very key role in how our job market and economy function - and how we can invest in innovative endeavors like entrepreneurship, **that can help it grow, to create real jobs and opportunities for Floridians. ** [Help Jeremy Get to the Cabinet. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OjD-N5eSm__-NaiMHXB-SLbvMplY7LJU8Ib0ltk6PqA=/1G88993fhpwm9bXxDrJq-JuEKtYhRICyEASwVm0fSyM=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) That is one of the reasons why I decided to throw my hat in the "ring" for this race. As your next CFO, I would take my experience in the State Senate and in the business world with me to the Cabinet, to help build and invest in an innovation economy, one that will be a national standard. But I have to get there first. **And I can 't do it without your help**. **We have another crucial End-of-Month fundraising deadline coming up in just 24 hours.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more before midnight on Wednesday - and help me bring our innovative vision to the cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OjD-N5eSm__-NaiMHXB-SLbvMplY7LJU8Ib0ltk6PqA=/1G88993fhpwm9bXxDrJq-JuEKtYhRICyEASwVm0fSyM=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/OjD-N5eSm__-NaiMHXB-SLbvMplY7LJU8Ib0ltk6PqA=/ASqVsWT1Lv8h-IV14tHoGycHI38BQXUWfi6KgYEdwGY=).

name: Peter Joffrion
subject: quick update
body:
---
After I wrote yesterday, dozens of friends, family, and supporters pitched in to help us close in on our end of month deadline. I truly can’t thank you enough for believing in our efforts to flip AL-05. What we raise now will go towards executing our voter outreach strategy and help keep my staff in the field. We’re still short of our midnight deadline. When Mo Brooks told a reporter he has more than enough cash on hand to win this race, I knew we had to push harder than ever. North Alabama deserves a responsive leader who puts the people first.

Whatever you can give right now -- $50, $250, $1,000, or whatever you can will help us flip this seat.

I’m hoping I can count on you for your support. Here’s the link to give: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterjoffrion4alabama](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1779715/9406605/172365608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDdhNzE3MS1kMjk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mh6rVwNZn8VAsaYBEbuMoBIKyZlVeBOG7-qkAGzRt78=&refcode=20180731a)

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: President Trump signs law that delivers for American workers
body:
| |
---
The White House • July, 31 2018
## The Day Ahead
**•** President Donald J. Trump and Ivanka Trump travel to Tampa, Florida, where they will discuss why the Perkins Career and Technical Education Act is a big deal for American workers. [Watch live at 6:10 p.m. ET.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMxLjkzMTY5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMS45MzE2OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyMDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **•** The President continues to call for Congressional action on immigration enforcement, highlighting the need for maximum border security and respect for ICE, particularly in light of the spike in Mexico’s murder rate. [See President Trump’s message.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMxLjkzMTY5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMS45MzE2OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyMDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1024248479386923009)
## **President Trump signs law that delivers for American workers**
**President Trump has made closing the skills gap** a top priority. Today, he will sign the Perkins CTE Act into law, which provides crucial funding toward training programs for American students and workers. **Perkins CTE provides more than $1 billion** each year to states for vocational and career-focused education programs. These programs, tailored toward secondary and post-secondary students, will help employers fill the high-skill jobs of tomorrow. This funding is key: 94% of high school students participate in Career and Technical Education courses and programs in some form. **Congress achieved a major bipartisan win** last week when both parties came together to pass this bill after years of stalled efforts. The White House, led by Ivanka Trump, brought a renewed focus to modernizing the program. “Manufacturers are encouraged to have partners in the White House like the president and Ivanka Trump who are laser-focused on worker training,” National Association of Manufacturers President Jay Timmons said. [See President Trump’s statement about this new law for our workers.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMxLjkzMTY5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMS45MzE2OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyMDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/statement-president-passage-legislation-reauthorize-carl-d-perkins-career-technical-education-act/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch live at 6:10 p.m. ET** : [The President’s ceremonial signing in Tampa, Florida](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMxLjkzMTY5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMS45MzE2OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyMDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## **World leader: President ‘is a great negotiator’**
**Italian Prime Minister Giuseppe Conte** visited Washington yesterday, meeting with President Trump to discuss terrorism, trade, migration, and the importance of reinvesting in NATO. **“Both the Prime Minister and I** are focused on the urgent need to protect our nations from terrorism and uncontrolled migration,” President Trump said. “Like the United States, Italy is currently under enormous strain as a result of illegal immigration. . . . The Prime Minister and I are united in our conviction that strong nations must have strong borders.” **The bottom line** , summed up by Prime Minister Conte: “You have a President who is a strong supporter and advocate of the interests of the American people and the American country. He's a great negotiator.” [Watch 30-second highlights of the Prime Minister’s visit.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMxLjkzMTY5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMS45MzE2OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyMDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H1T1FqEbff0) **More** : [See the full joint press conference with President Trump.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMxLjkzMTY5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMS45MzE2OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyMDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CbCBtB7HsOk)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**Robert Wilkie is sworn in as the new United States Secretary of Veterans Affairs** | July 30, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMxLjkzMTY5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMS45MzE2OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyMDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMxLjkzMTY5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMS45MzE2OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyMDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMxLjkzMTY5ODAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMS45MzE2OTgwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYyMDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Amy
subject: One more quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi there,

One more quick note before tonight's end-of-month deadline. Elise tells me we're still $4,890 short of our goal. I know we can get there, because I know this incredible team will do what it takes so we can combat climate change, lower the cost of prescription drugs, protect our elections, and so much more.

Before the clock strikes midnight, will you help us hit our goal? You can make a donation at this special link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ak-2018july-eom**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Mhfc8AgvM4zI79vYNvl4911cs4emv%2BQa)

Thanks for everything you do,
Amy

subject: It depends on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nStInXrIyZhWp226hSKeWd0zvPJpMKsI2gLn9Fm7cxc=/Wf0PRbLbbkpzcJUv_GCzcGbPTaSLmN7GgUO67jJ7-ag=?gpsid=8_36_2299&refcode=em18_180731_EOM1_fnd_gq_resend__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180731_EOM1_fnd_gq_resend__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

Here at Team Davis, we're planning our campaign strategy for the next three months.

But how many people we'll be able to reach depends on how much money we raise this month -- so meeting our fundraising goal is crucial.

**[Will you be one of the grassroots supporters who helps us out? Chip in $3 or more before our final end-of-month deadline before the primary tonight and help us keep up the momentum.](https://act.myngp.com/el/nStInXrIyZhWp226hSKeWd0zvPJpMKsI2gLn9Fm7cxc=/Wf0PRbLbbkpzcJUv_GCzcGbPTaSLmN7GgUO67jJ7-ag=?gpsid=8_36_2299&refcode=em18_180731_EOM1_fnd_gq_resend__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180731_EOM1_fnd_gq_resend__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: no time to pout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Peter, we're 99 days out from Election Day, and here's where things stand. You've already heard from Joe, Kelly, Peter, and Mike. Th |
---

| | Peter, here's what tonight comes down to: we close the books on July, wealthy GOP donors are pouring millions into Indiana, and the media and pollsters are saying this race is a total toss-up.

But there's no time to dwell on the odds. We have 98 days to do everything we can to beat my Republican opponent. I intend to work as hard as possible every one of those days to stop Mitch McConnell and his special-interest allies from implementing their agenda -- but I can't win without your help.

Our deadline is at midnight tonight, and all donations will be double-matched until that time. Will you chip in to give us the resources we need to beat Rep. Braun and the GOP special interests?

Here's the link:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-july-doublematch**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2f33/7377f838/3a0c227d/51f9bef8/711949650/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-july-doublematch?refcode=20180731.1")

Thanks,
Joe |

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Political games like this are killing our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Team --
If you talk to farmers, manufacturers, and small business owners here in Tennessee, like I’ve been doing these past few weeks, they’ll all tell you the same thing about these tariffs coming out of Washington: **They’re a bad deal for Tennessee.**
Washington knows it too — but instead of addressing the real problem, now they’re pulling out the credit card, spending $12 billion dollars to cover up the problem they created. **It’s wasteful. And, unfortunately, it’s typical.**
I’m applying to be your next U.S. Senator because political games like this are killing our country, and it’s time to put a stop to them. We need to get Washington focused on solving problems, not creating them.
[**My team and I are working hard every day to bring people together so we can bring that kind of common sense back to Washington. Can you chip in $15 or whatever you can to help support our campaign ahead of the pre-primary deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1781174/9414507/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAwMzk0Ni1kZjk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_jKEprVrou_pEIWoi3SiSM6Y6hD4zqisN2HpmBsWjE=&refcode=em180731-pre-primary-deadline-5-miss)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1781175/9414508/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAwMzk0Ni1kZjk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_jKEprVrou_pEIWoi3SiSM6Y6hD4zqisN2HpmBsWjE=&refcode=em180731-pre-primary-deadline-5-miss)**
We don’t need another politician in the Senate who will just keep playing the same partisan games that got us into this mess in the first place. It’s time to end politics as usual in Washington.
**When you chip in to our campaign, you’re giving us the resources we need to take that message straight to the voters.**
[**Add your donation of $15 right now to help us keep this campaign focus on the issues that matter to Tennesseans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1781176/9414509/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAwMzk0Ni1kZjk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_jKEprVrou_pEIWoi3SiSM6Y6hD4zqisN2HpmBsWjE=&refcode=em180731-pre-primary-deadline-5-miss)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1781177/9414510/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAwMzk0Ni1kZjk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_jKEprVrou_pEIWoi3SiSM6Y6hD4zqisN2HpmBsWjE=&refcode=em180731-pre-primary-deadline-5-miss)**

name: Lipinski for Congress
subject: how you can help our environment right now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter, please read the message from Dan
below. We’re making the next two days an all-or-nothing blitz to
fight back against the climate deniers and corporate polluters,
but we need your help.

Rush your contribution to our Climate Defense Fund right now
→ (
secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-climate-defense-fund?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180731_1_2&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D
)

Begin forwarded message:

Peter,

Protecting our environment means protecting the health
and well-being of all Americans. As renewables become cheaper and
cheaper, moving to a green economy also makes good business
sense. America can and must be a leader in fighting climate
change.

But under this Republican Congress, America is lagging
behind, and in some cases even actively sabotaging the fight
against climate change.

We cannot allow the climate disinformation and
destruction to continue.

We’re launching our Climate Defense Fund to fight for
environmental protections and anti-pollution policies RIGHT NOW.
It’s time for the EPA and Congressional Republicans to put people
first, not corporate polluters. Rush your contribution here to
help us start off strong with $5,000 for our fund to take action
immediately. We need to have every dollar in the door before our
end-of-month deadline at MIDNIGHT TOMORROW.

subject: Fire the cannons!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hello Friend, I don’t know any other way to express this. We are ONE WEEK away from the August 7th primary. Everyone to battle stations! Fire the cannons! All men and women to arms! This is not a drill. I have never needed your support more than now in this moment. Today is the last day of our online fundraising goal. We need another 261 people to contribute by the end of the day. Friend, I know that we can win. I would not ask you donate if I did not believe we can defeat Josh Hawley, and I know I can beat Claire McCaskill this fall. [**I am asking to make a big step today and make an online donation to the campaign. Any amount. You can donate any amount by clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D073118_nondonmorning%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073118_nondonmorning&n=1) Maybe you’ve never contributed to a campaign before? Maybe you feel that you are unable to make a difference with a small contribution? I want you to imagine the impact having another Rand Paul in the Senate would have. It is up to us grow this movement and restore the Republic. This is an historic opportunity to grow the liberty movement. I am asking for your help. Even if you can only donate $2, $4, $10, $20.18 please send a contribution to the campaign today. Every dollar makes a difference. [**Maybe you can donate more. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Closing July
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

As the past several weeks have shown, our campaign continues to make tremendous strides in Virginia's 7th District.

From our ratings changes to our 2,000+ volunteers knocking on doors and calling voters, our campaign continues to draw attention, build excitement, and show that **this race is winnable.**

**But we 're not letting the great progress we've made distract us from reality. **This race is by no means in the bag. No matter what the experts are telling us, we're still looking at an uphill battle, and we need **everyone on board** if we're going to claim victory in November.

Today marks the end of July -- and the start of the final push for this campaign. This race is going to be unlike any the 7th District has ever seen, and it's essential that we hit every fundraising deadline to ensure we have the resources to endure. Right now, we are still $8,537 short of our July goal. **[Can you contribute now to help us close our July on top?](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Cx8vnH2nPR7t0whlJDLjDOgCG_mxpaGRY-pem191Ik=/RMEqLbq7o2NvqhgMemOdMl5K_6cicGzmjIxKMqlqxy4=?refcode=julyeom1)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Cx8vnH2nPR7t0whlJDLjDOgCG_mxpaGRY-pem191Ik=/RMEqLbq7o2NvqhgMemOdMl5K_6cicGzmjIxKMqlqxy4=?refcode=julyeom1)

We need to finish the month strong so we can finish the race even stronger, Peter. **And we can 't do it without you.**

Thank you so much for your support.

-Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Cx8vnH2nPR7t0whlJDLjDOgCG_mxpaGRY-pem191Ik=/A03H5K1FxVjVH48Al8Rz6picXAPIeDG75LfP9n_ySo4=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Cx8vnH2nPR7t0whlJDLjDOgCG_mxpaGRY-pem191Ik=/bRJo5kmel1C0wghZJtPdEgyWBEzRrMGkL1xaiojwUYU=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

name: Josh Fox
subject: This is all Larry's offering, right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
It's time to step up for our planet.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc77d/1145774121/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A") Friend, When I started on my first movie "Gasland", I had no idea the full effects that we were having on our climate -- and eight years ago I learned just how serious, and how fast, our climate is changing. Forever. Maryland citizens have always been at the forefront of the fight against fracking, and I have been happy to campaign alongside of Marylanders from Baltimore to Frostburg for nearly a decade. I can tell you that Larry Hogan does not stand with those courageous citizens who have been fighting for so long for our future. Ben Jealous is our real champion, fighting fracking from day one, and we must elect him governor. We don't have long to stabilize our climate, which is why progressive leaders like Ben Jealous are so crucial to this fight. He knows fracking is the wrong way forward for Maryland, and he's committed to making green jobs a center point of his plan to build a stronger economy. We can't change D.C. -- yet. But we have a hell of a chance to make progress where it counts, starting right here in Maryland. **We need to elect green leaders like Ben Jealous, because our planet can't wait.** [**Today is the deadline for Ben's end-of-month fundraising goal to raise $60,000 -- he only has $8,450 left to go. Can you chip in $5 or more before midnight?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc77d/1145774121/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc77c/1145774121/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A&amount=5&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc77f/1145774121/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A&amount=25&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc77e/1145774121/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A&amount=50&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc779/1145774121/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc778/1145774121/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc77b/1145774121/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A&express_lane=true")
---
Despite the parade of scientists that have stood before the Maryland Commission on Climate Change, Governor Hogan recently doubled down on his policy of "kick-starting" greater combustion of fracked gas in Maryland, while vetoing legislation promoting wind and solar power.
Larry Hogan is partnering with TransCanada -- the same folks behind the Keystone XL Pipeline -- to pipe Pennsylvania fracked gas right through Maryland. He wants $100 million to do it.
He'd have you believe that fracked gas is clean energy. But Ben knows the only real clean energy is energy that comes from renewables like wind and solar power -- NOT fossil fuels. We need more than thoughts, prayers, and checks from fossil fuel giants like TransCanada. We need action.
[**Help elect a real climate justice leader by donating $5 or more to Ben Jealous before his end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight -- and let's show Larry Hogan what he's up against.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc77d/1145774121/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A")
Thanks,
Josh Fox
Director, Gasland

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc77d/1145774121/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07318A")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc77a/1145774121/VEsHBA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc765/1145774121/VEsHBw/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc764/1145774121/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37afdc/7ab0e2c4/7ff026cf/349bc767/1145774121/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

body:
Before Bob Hugin announced his campaign to take back New Jersey, Bob Menendez’s seat was meant to be a safe Democrat seat. Now, a new... | |

Peter,

Before Bob Hugin announced his campaign to take back New Jersey, Bob Menendez’s seat was meant to be a safe Democrat seat.

Now, a new Gravis Marketing poll says Bob Menendez is barely hanging on. **We’ve cut his lead to a razor thin 2 point margin and are on the verge of a MAJOR upset.**

It’s clear more and more New Jerseyans are fed up with a corrupt career politician who was indicted and severely admonished by Democrat and Republican Senate colleagues for abusing his Senatorial power.

Supporters around New Jersey are continuing to step up and help send Bob Menendez packing.

The momentum is on our side to retire Menendez once and for all and the Menendez Campaign is attacking Bob Hugin out of desperation.

We can’t let their attacks go unanswered.

**If we want to win this election, we need to raise $35,000 by the end of this month - 11:59pm tonight to respond to Menendez’s attacks and set the record straight about Bob Hugin’s accomplishments.**

The momentum is on our side to retire Menendez once and for all.

Opportunities like this don’t come around often.

Let’s seize this opportunity.

It’s clear more and more New Jerseyans are fed up with a corrupt career politician who was indicted and severely admonished by Democrat and Republican Senate colleagues for abusing his Senatorial power. Supporters around New Jersey are continuing to step up and help send Bob Menendez packing. The momentum is on our side to retire Menendez once and for all and the Menendez Campaign is attacking Bob Hugin out of desperation. We can’t let their attacks go unanswered. If we want to win this election, we need to raise $35,000 by the end of this month - 11:59pm tonight to respond to Menendez’s attacks and set the record straight about Bob Hugin’s accomplishments. The momentum is on our side to retire Menendez once and for all. Opportunities like this don’t come around often. Let’s seize this opportunity. Our finance team created this safe and secure link for you to make your donation: Thank you, Stacy Schuster Campaign Manager Bob Hugin for Senate P.S. 2018 will be a historic election year – taking back New Jersey won’t be easy, but New Jerseyans have stepped up before, and I know we can do it again. Here’s a quick link for you to keep up our incredible momentum:** ** | | | Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc. | | PO BOX 8656, Somerville, NJ 08876 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
Everything we're fighting for is on the line with taking back the Senate.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a71c/c1f7015/6adf9c1d/11427c61/298634761/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180731AM_em-r") Hi friend, it's Jake, Tina's Finance Director. We're still over 700 contributions short of our goal of 50,000 by midnight. **We 're going to need a surge of grassroots contributions right now for us to have any hope of hitting this big goal before our deadline. [Can you pitch in here?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a71c/c1f7015/6adf9c1d/11427c61/298634761/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180731AM_em-r")** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a71c/c1f7015/6adf9c1d/11427c62/298634761/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180731AM_em-r&refcode2=btn") This isn't just about hitting a goal -- it's about making sure our campaign has the resources to win, take on the special interests and big donors backing our right-wing opponent Karin Housley, and ensure the Senate turns blue. And let's be clear: Health care, immigration reform, action on climate change, stopping Trump's agenda -- everything we're fighting for is on the line with taking back the Senate and winning this race. **Please, make a contribution here and ensure we hit this goal before midnight:[https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/50000-contributions](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a71c/c1f7015/6adf9c1d/11427c61/298634761/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180731AM_em-r")** Let's do this, Jake Fons

Peter - we're going to keep this short.

You've seen what Gov. John Kasich has been doing to urge Congress and the President to stop playing endless politics and focus on passing meaningful legislation that improves the lives of Americans.

**That is what they're there to do, right?**

We're going to keep at it for as long as it takes but we could use your help.

John Kasich has been doing to urge Congress and the President to stop playing endless politics and focus on passing meaningful legislation that improves the lives of Americans. Thank you! -Team Kasich "Facebook" "Twitter" "Web Site" "Instagram" "YouTube" Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

body:
We only have a few hours left, and if you haven’t donated yet I need your help now. Peter,

I am always floored by the level of support that Team Hawley has from Missourians like you. My fundraising team just updated me, _and we’re already well over halfway to our fundraising goal for the end of the month._
However, we only have a few hours left, and [if you haven’t donated yet I need your help now.](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=017bdf9e516f4d5aa16a1911f86e4ea9&_e=L4q38K4AHSQleAUYYaURruQcUmxXw4sat7UQ1Kbr7Oj-gbsFh5Hx3xnJ4MdZWMDfqc5onb5bHJczNfSr99aXLUK4yDxMmQr6PYg8jzRijNzcn3GDYx6njD93JzdEtmABjx2SLj0BHygrbcZp3ZBCNSzsMUkwUB_ojHSWcFrj4oQeVa6cwe4WAk2rMo03eCoMRhS23nxmZTqPqTZ-DnKaI6kPxbghYEd9pW_Aqwur45LQlMQ6BxFaD11LJXqtcFMOHO5KmvH4E55INZWlo9ck3eLQ_nfoQOU7Ylsk4ESJ_L8%3D)
Please show your support for Team Hawley [before the end of the day](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=017bdf9e516f4d5aa16a1911f86e4ea9&_e=L4q38K4AHSQleAUYYaURruQcUmxXw4sat7UQ1Kbr7Oj-gbsFh5Hx3xnJ4MdZWMDfqc5onb5bHJczNfSr99aXLUZNu0WRxMlrSH2E2lSJUh0vPWhQ_Q4ym139sLNjEqlz6KNm_16ASTE_gyjbD-ro-GX07qNH1IK-arsLOQOEbb5tjwTRJsUEYzReYI0UY_-VTQ8QBMKpXTsNPSNrVRWf6hQfxmjysVJG4z8xdD1S67eCDKfH_Z4ywxhqaOfOiM6kKEMprZceQFbETY-8_AJ3rNvGXUUlhKviRkmsKLug820%3D), and help us keep our momentum going all the way to Election Day.
Sincerely,Josh Hawley
**\-------Forwarded Message-------****From** : Team Hawley**To** : Josh personal**Date** : July 30, 2018**Subject** : McCaskill-Schumer playbook revealed Recently, Politico put out an article revealing Chuck Schumer’s plan to obstruct Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation.

His advice to fellow liberals? **To not tell anyone their decision, and hope that some Republicans join their side.** Funnily enough, that’s exactly what Claire McCaskill is doing.

McCaskill’s prolonged hesitation isn’t a sign she’s taking time to think about her decision. _**It’s a sign that she is doing what Schumer tells her to do.** _

A true independent thinker would be meeting with Kavanaugh. In fact, even some of her fellow Democrats are already planning meetings with him, while McCaskill runs away from anyone who asks.

[Missouri cannot go another six years with a Schumer rubber stamp for a senator. ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=017bdf9e516f4d5aa16a1911f86e4ea9&_e=L4q38K4AHSQleAUYYaURruQcUmxXw4sat7UQ1Kbr7Oj-gbsFh5Hx3xnJ4MdZWMDfqc5onb5bHJczNfSr99aXLfZ2LYHtlDNK0bVjK3ZZauX3klojmj8f7HnYtzeCWBHBAueHiGd7xh4jx7xaFmwNXG8YoYe5DRuHBnnRo3TNKRO1pLo1qiaTRZP4wmDwb7Jy52XQ-pftDXCcBrbB1idD_QSdCILoQgLHsu13EVDeKtR4IZB6zf7wK0eXDd-qo9-HMr2AXSkba8jvK4E-WPDokR2YOKQF4qe_i6NMi7GHcIk%3D)

We talked to Josh, and we’re going to make sure Missourians all over the state know the truth about the McCaskill-Schumer plan. [To do that though, we’re going to need to hit our fundraising goal of $5,000 new online donations by the end of July - that means we need your help.](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=017bdf9e516f4d5aa16a1911f86e4ea9&_e=L4q38K4AHSQleAUYYaURruQcUmxXw4sat7UQ1Kbr7Oj-gbsFh5Hx3xnJ4MdZWMDfqc5onb5bHJczNfSr99aXLSogr7HpOTKCiwGP0qGyfHh4CsRfeRxUjkWSIlLSmhQ4rXB9zOeZgFRH1KmAi6XoQMdJ4TTF7BKpivOQJ3OGM88ZSYuaiUYDoXH7MdOaR_nfjtMTTPmElDw-HPIKd52jzyJdqEjBvLrO5pIa8J6VmdWV2WA0MG5KMPDw59Llb8RVmKmsHX9koyXbv82ThlA0bZp9nMLVaP0bdfC2F7RBR_g%3D)
[ Stand With Josh - Donate Now! ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=017bdf9e516f4d5aa16a1911f86e4ea9&_e=L4q38K4AHSQleAUYYaURruQcUmxXw4sat7UQ1Kbr7Oj-gbsFh5Hx3xnJ4MdZWMDfqc5onb5bHJczNfSr99aXLReI5NZLt3MKQVA1Nvr0XYDvkRc6eQGFmTnxzsSj38Z1-oZERmzsOIwS0gAmszHS3czVScg1i0PNKPsj87UTRqsV8U3K5YuQOakYj7G0pX10EElV4Y2gkgRZO6BDPBJvDhqI9oKEqMHeuB5bwUyRquYs3sguhaSEwOa3LuQVyv0-Vg1v9CsQvj4KAHnF-dKvW8jm6InvvURVCkBh0r3R1HM%3D) Will you pitch in and help us hit our goal by tomorrow night? We want to spread our message to every Missourian in the state, and we can’t do that without your support.

[Help Team Hawley, and let’s show McCaskill and Schumer that we won't fall for their obstructionist strategy.](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=017bdf9e516f4d5aa16a1911f86e4ea9&_e=L4q38K4AHSQleAUYYaURruQcUmxXw4sat7UQ1Kbr7Oj-gbsFh5Hx3xnJ4MdZWMDfqc5onb5bHJczNfSr99aXLRAeL2rhJwKD2hEsT3wfGZDa3R5v64-H8-br6mRr4DaZXgFUmaGEHa-gzrTnz2wS7xlhJJ-pFmFjmoawj7-o6fQ1xC5SNuw5kaDGSzr9yRZBH8AyX7CqmH3mPSdMTAE2JBTKJndI9ZdZjJkPSwxwRTSjHZfwSK56QistJ-odwO8ehXvuYM7Xv9lMToFdZiBRhIiz8tbL1Fjbi9ZYEF4GaHI%3D)
[ Stand With Josh - Donate Now! ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=017bdf9e516f4d5aa16a1911f86e4ea9&_e=L4q38K4AHSQleAUYYaURruQcUmxXw4sat7UQ1Kbr7Oj-gbsFh5Hx3xnJ4MdZWMDfqc5onb5bHJczNfSr99aXLZ3aat9NZ4ZP0Ll4yjAP6NfDM0ojyck6lAeYx6XtvYA8HLf5Wf7cLnhPpW4j38DTUULvuMIor0DFHFc0DblOioukK_vx8avLm2odOt6TkeCcw7Uq4uzMCRCr_XEB59Qahl8nEO-PZH1rXKOFEWpiqBiRj47wUo-EkHLxYd3yDMhcMlrN2uSX88vgWiaw0bH5L53TU1cVxRbD5p2cqVmzBXM%3D) For Missouri,Team Hawley

name: Max Harris
subject: Our opponent just launched her first TV ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Big news this morning: our opponent just launched her first TV ads of the general election.

Rep. Walorski has already raised hundreds of thousands of dollars in corporate PAC money -- and her special interest allies will make sure her campaign has all the resources she needs through Election Day.

Mel isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money -- instead, this campaign is funded by thousands of supporters like you chipping in whatever they can afford to fight for transparent, accountable leadership in Washington.

**[That means Mel is counting on you, friends: will you pitch in $5 before tonight's end-of-July fundraising deadline to fund our first TV ad buy and counter our opponent's corporate PAC spending?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9IK31v0KXW3_ohItH4q0iCSSkgVq3FR9RIQiha1x0g4=/0BLKKd8jks_DS-EBnmntvoalxJsSJa2b82cyP1bYNXI=?refcode=em180731)**

Our race was recently rated more likely to flip Democratic. We have a chance to win -- but it's going to take all of us working together to defeat Rep. Walorski's corporate PAC money and special interest allies.

**Now that our opponent is up on TV, there 's no time to wait to support Mel. Please contribute before tonight's deadline to make sure Mel has the resources we need to win.**

_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/9IK31v0KXW3_ohItH4q0iCSSkgVq3FR9RIQiha1x0g4=/0BLKKd8jks_DS-EBnmntvoalxJsSJa2b82cyP1bYNXI=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em180731)

[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/9IK31v0KXW3_ohItH4q0iCSSkgVq3FR9RIQiha1x0g4=/0BLKKd8jks_DS-EBnmntvoalxJsSJa2b82cyP1bYNXI=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em180731)
[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/9IK31v0KXW3_ohItH4q0iCSSkgVq3FR9RIQiha1x0g4=/0BLKKd8jks_DS-EBnmntvoalxJsSJa2b82cyP1bYNXI=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=em180731)

Walorski has already raised hundreds of thousands of dollars in corporate PAC money -- and her special interest allies will make sure her campaign has all the resources she needs through Election Day. Mel isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money -- instead, this campaign is funded by thousands of supporters like you chipping in whatever they can afford to fight for transparent, accountable leadership in Washington. Our race was recently rated more likely to flip Democratic. We have a chance to win -- but it's going to take all of us working together to defeat Rep. Walorski's corporate PAC money and special interest allies. Now that our opponent is up on TV, there 's no time to wait to support Mel. Please contribute before tonight's deadline to make sure Mel has the resources we need to win. If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Max Harris Campaign Manager, Mel Hall for Congress Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress Mel Hall for Congress P.O. Box 862 South Bend, IN 46624 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

subject: President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | **President Trump's political organization is giving Sherrod 's opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci's campaign more cash.** They're about to send Renacci a check for the "maximum amount allowed by law." | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff846/4462dc26/68b3f7bb/2007622d/4144134589/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzMxYW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180731am?refcode=sbe180731am_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
Trump and his organization aren't the heroes in this story, coming to Renacci's rescue. This is a desperate attempt to defeat Sherrod and replace him with a rubber-stamp for Trump's anti-family, anti-women, anti-working class agenda.
But Renacci's also closing the gap in the polls. Between that and outside attacks, the Trump organization's desperate attempt can work. It's a powerful reminder that if we want to keep Sherrod fighting like hell for us in the Senate, we need to fight like hell to keep him there.
[**Will you rush in a contribution Peter to help us reach our $650,000 July goal in the NEXT 13 HOURS? Whether you match our $26 average online contribution or just pitch in $5 or $3, any amount will help.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff846/4462dc26/68b3f7bb/2007622d/4144134589/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzMxYW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180731am?refcode=sbe180731am_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff846/4462dc26/68b3f7bb/2007622c/4144134589/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzMxYW0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180731am?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180731am_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**

body:
Your Indiana Republican Party is excited to announce that we'll have a this year's Indiana State Fair! In a high-stakes election year like 2018... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/its-state-fair-time?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=560635803f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Your Indiana Republican Party is excited to announce that _**we will yet again have a booth this year's Indiana State Fair**_ , which begins this Friday!

In a high-stakes election year like 2018, we're out talking to Hoosiers every day, and what better place than the Indiana State Fair to tell Hoosiers about **Mike Braun** and our historic statewide team of **Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** and **Auditor Tera Klutz**?

And that's where you come in. We need your help!
* _**Be the Face of Your Indiana Republican Party**_
With the 17-day event, we need all-hands-on-deck to staff our booth and to talk with voters. [Sign-up here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=df07ffe693&e=1acd9bb3d6), and a member of our team will be in touch to schedule you for a three-hour shift (which includes a free ticket to the fair!).

* _**Stop by the Booth to Show Your Support**_
Plan to be at the fair, but don't have time to volunteer? Stop by our booth, which will be on the northwest side of the fairgrounds near the free stage. We're having a friendly competition between Indiana's 92 counties, and the county with the most visitors to our booth wins!

This year, the Indiana State Fair runs from August 3-19. Make sure you don't miss out on the fun, and [either sign-up for a volunteer slot](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48603dcc87&e=1acd9bb3d6) (**which includes a free ticket to the fair**) or make plans to stop by our booth to sign a banner for your county and grab some fun Republican swag!

See you at the fair!

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: Here’s why Laxalt was in Colorado
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/S77V4ruDAqcEAfGjkMfi39KwC9B22O2-23C2wj0joNs=/F4M7jIXAgxg8M3_PcPS9O16xj9-ftuOPuOoqfgxlS7Y=?gpsid=8_57_2475&refcode=em18_180731_EOM6_fnd_gq_ful__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180731_EOM6_fnd_gq_ful__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---

Dear friend,

Where was I this weekend? All over Nevada! I had a great time up in Northern Nevada and down in Las Vegas speaking with voters, attending a Pride parade, knocking on doors, and meeting with the community.

Adam Laxalt, on the other hand, left Nevada to rub elbows with the Kochs and their network of wealthy, special-interest donors -- the same network that is already spending $2.5 million propping up his campaign.

That's right -- instead of spending time among the families he's running to represent, Laxalt is busy taking cues from billionaires like the Kochs, discussing how to buy this election and enact their far-right agenda.

**[As governor, I promise to serve the people-- not out-of-touch, special-interest donors. Donate $5 before our end-of-month deadline TONIGHT to fight back against Adam Laxalt and his billionaire backers.](https://act.myngp.com/el/S77V4ruDAqcEAfGjkMfi39KwC9B22O2-23C2wj0joNs=/F4M7jIXAgxg8M3_PcPS9O16xj9-ftuOPuOoqfgxlS7Y=?gpsid=8_57_2475&refcode=em18_180731_EOM6_fnd_gq_ful__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180731_EOM6_fnd_gq_ful__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

I'm proud of the campaign we've run, and I'm ready to keep reaching out to voters across every corner of _this_ state, not special interests like the Kochs.

But that means I still need the help of supporters like you to fight back against Laxalt's dark money.

**[Please help us fight back against the Koch network by contributing $5 or whatever you can to our campaign before midnight tonight.](https://act.myngp.com/el/S77V4ruDAqcEAfGjkMfi39KwC9B22O2-23C2wj0joNs=/F4M7jIXAgxg8M3_PcPS9O16xj9-ftuOPuOoqfgxlS7Y=?gpsid=8_57_2475&refcode=em18_180731_EOM6_fnd_gq_ful__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180731_EOM6_fnd_gq_ful__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Thanks,

Steve Sisolak
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/S77V4ruDAqcEAfGjkMfi39KwC9B22O2-23C2wj0joNs=/F4M7jIXAgxg8M3_PcPS9O16xj9-ftuOPuOoqfgxlS7Y=?gpsid=8_57_2475&refcode=em18_180731_EOM6_fnd_gq_ful__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180731_EOM6_fnd_gq_ful__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
---

Friends for Steve Sisolak
P.O. Box 850
Las Vegas NV 89125 United States

name: Tracy Newman, Team Inslee
subject: Your 2018 Statement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
The progressive movement is growing -- we need you to keep up the momentum.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78480/2f5ea88d/76c41c66/2cbc38a1/3052288355/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-31_july-eom-7&refcode=ema_2018-07-31_july-eom-7&utm_campaign=july-eom-7&utm_medium=ema") | **Your Team Inslee Status**

**Email Address:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2018 Team Inslee Donation:** Incomplete **Suggested Action:** [**Donate $5**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78480/2f5ea88d/76c41c66/2cbc38a1/3052288355/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-31_july-eom-7&refcode=ema_2018-07-31_july-eom-7&utm_campaign=july-eom-7&utm_medium=ema")
---
Friend,
The progressive movement is growing -- and with it, our ability to stop Trump's agenda in the states.
Governor Inslee has been leading the nation in passing progressive legislation and challenging Trump's immoral actions head-on. We need leaders like him to show the country what's possible when you invest in your citizens and protect our shared values.
But right now, we're facing the biggest deadline of 2018. And even the New York Times is taking notice of the movement we're building -- so you better believe all eyes will be on our fundraising report to determine our strength. Tonight at midnight, we'll have a make-or-break moment for our movement.
Our team has an ambitious goal of $25,000 by midnight tonight. Jay is counting on friends like you to support this country's progressive leaders. Don't let him down -- we need you to chip in now.
[**Can you send in a donation right away to make sure we hit our goal before our end-of-month deadline tonight?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78480/2f5ea88d/76c41c66/2cbc38a1/3052288355/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-31_july-eom-7&refcode=ema_2018-07-31_july-eom-7&utm_campaign=july-eom-7&utm_medium=ema")
We need to grow Governor Inslee's ability to show our progressive strength in the face of Trump's backward policy and dangerous rhetoric -- and we need to do it now.
With so much at stake, we must have the resources to take on the Trump administration and lead the country in progressive legislation. And we need you on our side.
Thanks for stepping up,
Tracy Newman
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78480/2f5ea88d/76c41c66/2cbc38a1/3052288355/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-31_july-eom-7&refcode=ema_2018-07-31_july-eom-7&utm_campaign=july-eom-7&utm_medium=ema")

subject: midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Our July fundraising deadline is TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT. And we're running $985 short of our goal, so this thing is really going to come down to the wire.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d63384b/1a8421e1/1a5309f9f/489ca7f3/2757651411/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Team, **Our July fundraising deadline is TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT. And we 're running $985 short of our goal, so this thing is really going to come down to the wire.** [_**Rush a donation so we can hit our goal and keep AZ-01 blue >>**_](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.31_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") You might not think that [**chipping in $5 before our deadline**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.31_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") will make a difference in this race. But trust me -- it really will. _Here 's what we'll do with your $5:_
* Buy pencils and clipboards so our team of volunteers can keep knocking doors and making calls
* Build up our advertising budget so we can share Tom's strong record with families across our district
* **Fight back against the far-right 's big money and their Super PACs -- _[$5 and $10 at a time](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.31_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")_**

As Tom's campaign manager, my job is to make sure all the moving parts of this campaign come together and result in a win in November. _And let me tell you -- all of those moving parts cost money, so every dollar counts._ Adding to the pressure -- Tom is a top target of the far-right this fall because he's the MOST ENDANGERED Democrat in the House. So we REALLY need to build up our budget so we're prepared to fight back against misleading attacks. [**Please, team: Help us beat this goal and re-elect Tom with a donation before the midnight deadline >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.31_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Ryan Mulcahy Campaign Manager
| ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.31_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

"" Team, Our July fundraising deadline is TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT. And we 're running $985 short of our goal, so this thing is really going to come down to the wire. "=" You might not think that "=" will make a difference in this race. But trust me -- it really will. Here 's what we'll do with your $5: Buy pencils and clipboards so our team of volunteers can keep knocking doors and making calls Build up our advertising budget so we can share Tom's strong record with families across our district Fight back against the far-right 's big money and their Super PACs -- "=" As Tom's campaign manager, my job is to make sure all the moving parts of this campaign come together and result in a win in November. And let me tell you -- all of those moving parts cost money, so every dollar counts. Adding to the pressure -- Tom is a top target of the far-right this fall because he's the MOST ENDANGERED Democrat in the House. So we REALLY need to build up our budget so we're prepared to fight back against misleading attacks. "=" Thanks, Ryan Mulcahy Campaign Manager | "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "="._ ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

subject: Tomorrow's Rally in Hot Springs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hayden Shamel for Arkansas
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends:

By now, I'm sure you've heard the news that Jeff Sessions and a surrogate for Betsy DeVos will be in Hot Springs tomorrow afternoon. It's not every day that cabinet members visit our fair city - and in light of their visit, we will be holding a rally at our Hot Springs office to draw attention to the needs of Arkansas public schools.

We invite you to join local activists and federal, state, and local candidates to learn how to get involved to fight the negative policy decisions of this administration. Doors open at 320 Ouachita Avenue at 1:30 with rally to begin at 2:00; there will be a caravan to a march site immediately following. Parking is available along Ouachita Avenue and in lot on Hickory Street.

You don't want to miss this. We can't wait to see you there.

The Hayden for Congress Team
