name: Team DWS
subject: Today's a big day for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
Welcome to Tuesday, July 31st. It's the last day of the month, which means two big things for Team DWS.
|
---
| | Welcome to Tuesday, July 31st. It's the last day of the month, which means two big things for Team DWS.
1. We're one week closer to the end of President Trump's term! Only 129 weeks to go.

2. **Our deadline to reach our July goal is midnight tonight.[Can you give?](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f62/622b7b5b/1c0106c2/307b992c/1686600094/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726e?refcode=dwse180726e_m&recurring=true&amount=5")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f62/622b7b5b/1c0106c2/307b992f/1686600094/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzI2ZSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180726e?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse180726e_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f62/622b7b5b/1c0106c2/307b992f/1686600094/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzI2ZSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180726e?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse180726e_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f62/622b7b5b/1c0106c2/307b992f/1686600094/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzI2ZSIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180726e?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse180726e_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f62/622b7b5b/1c0106c2/307b992e/1686600094/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzI2ZSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180726e?refcode=dwse180726e_m_other&refcode2=861769")** [**We're about $5,674 short of our $25,000 goal with less than 12 hours to go. Can you rush in a contribution before the day is out?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f62/622b7b5b/1c0106c2/307b992c/1686600094/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726e?refcode=dwse180726e_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Hitting these goals matters because it helps us keep Debbie fighting for us in Congress. We need Debbie working to protect Medicare, Social Security, Planned Parenthood, the ACA, and all the things we care about. We need Debbie in Congress, spending the next 129 weeks of Trump's tenure fighting his radical, anti-immigrant, anti-woman, anti-LGBT agenda. **Debbie is up against five opponents.** If we want to keep Debbie in Congress speaking out, we cannot be complacent. We need to step up. [**Before tonight's deadline, be sure to get your contribution in. Even just $5 or $3 will help.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f62/622b7b5b/1c0106c2/307b992c/1686600094/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726e?refcode=dwse180726e_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thanks! Team DWS

body:
We have less than one hundred days until Election Day, Friend.
|

Friend,

When Roy launched Break the Majority, he focused on building a strong grassroots organization that could be successful across the state.

And, for the first time in history, a Democrat is running in every district across the state -- so there's a lot of work to do in order to break the Republican super-majority.

**BTM's field team is already doing an amazing job, but successful grassroots field programs cost money.** [**We still need to raise about $3,000 before tonight's midnight deadline. Can you chip in to help us break the majority?**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b1c/2fde7c66/4920dad7/15681b5f/2823556495/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-july-eom?refcode=em18_180731_eom4_fnd_gq_ful__rcc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+We+still+need+to+raise+about+3000+before&utm_campaign=em18_180731_eom4_fnd_gq_ful__rcc_ettx&source=em18_180731_eom4_fnd_gq_ful__rcc_ettx")

name: Climate Defense (via Team Lipinski)
subject: make your mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter -- We need Congress to make a
huge course-correct on our environment. It’s no coincidence that
extreme weather is more and more common as the world continues to
break heat records, and corporate polluters get to “regulate”
themselves.

Our Climate Defense Fund is ready to execute at the
grassroots level right up to leading the charge in Congress to
fight for rational, clean-energy policies that protect our
environment.

We’re only a few thousand short of our goal, but the deadline
is TONIGHT. Every contribution helps get us closer to a
sustainable world. Can you rush a contribution now to support our
Climate Defense Fund?
( http://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-climate-defense-fund?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180731_2_3&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Our jobs, our economy, and our health will all suffer if

name: Osmack for Missouri
subject: Did you see Mark on TV???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tC4yj5G_m2zORPZYAa1wI1bvvxW1lWtv0PFsKKHf70k=/5uKu4zqWV4dRgPNHnKxQ9BUE24mWJdoD-Uxf_KMWizI=) Friends, Our first TV ad aired this morning, and it's all because of your support! The video gives voters a great look at Mark's roots in St. Louis and his leadership on important issues like Medicare for All. The video is also doing awesome in its first couple days on Facebook, with over 5,000 views! We'll continue airing it through August 7th to reach more and more voters in our district. You can also help by sharing the video on your Facebook, Twitter, or by emailing your friends. If you haven't seen the 90 second version of the video yet, check it out [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/tC4yj5G_m2zORPZYAa1wI1bvvxW1lWtv0PFsKKHf70k=/wZ-ilNnRBoPv1VM8ei8ZIb4plattSnmxrysQWujItE8=) and please share it with your friends!
With exactly one week until the election, we're still trying to reach our fundraising goal so that we can keep our message on the air, on social media, and to make sure the district is blanketed with thousands of yard signs going into Election Day. body:
Derek,
Have you seen the latest report? [Senator Shaheen is undecided on Judge Brett Kavanuagh's confirmation.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyDMiHB722zi8x3GEo-2Bo5iGxV3bv-2B-2FWYowKFlyUoamO8DQDsTA30BoIlR0HvKHCotHnblw5VRsffmqznCGm1hFb-2F6omlVDk-2FcJpOhAXmglP-2FGHgIjv6Ed0oI2PjNbECjVhQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MoIHfMLSlErXgPHPDgUzV4t6-2B0w57FHHyRmX0elmT2DUM3ATqkkaE7NzPElP1qqBLeoELZVsErO3NXttSmaPOCEcGWW-2Fknw-2F7broDTwW-2BarNsRwPOgMegb-2B1p1jsK0BtBN7Gb2EDmjiVxwPoWTtpFerL3YPxOqbjaYuAqBkJZIG9bjTYnMa5hk0JirVa9XS4xDVbK4-2F76y-2FVD-2BRPVZnKVGW5nIHDlGM0xH5LciI1JUYG3UOh4q3Gs6Hr80NEJa1FowDjZ87kLG5croOPEXHdC3w-3D-3D)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I just received word that former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich has officially endorsed my campaign. I wanted to make sure you heard the news....

Friend,

I just received word that former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich has officially endorsed my campaign. I wanted to make sure you heard the news before anyone else.

This is a big deal, friend. Speaker Gingrich has been the go-to spokesman for conservative values for years. He has championed more conservative reforms than I can count, and is a key ally of President Trump.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSd9xQ4H8wcUn2195Mc_a9eaHlRA5UyWKolpuBj-Ehva0ZR83Qyd64GE5vrmIfnvAtJzp2kA4cxWTMH-DPPfgNl9omXQ6yHMRe6-UZkrpLhxKrn5NUs7Y5tOcQpcWpGVE5zAJRHt02BL33mWDqfJtVmpzIxoaqSYZs-J9OtTW1wZNJ5Jr66ru-sNsm7_V5W0SFdlJV_DxJRe2nmjXFGctku5nhjxAto_JxawXvMLA-NAHfVMhYwYuLdTKw1Ay9nQyXE4TrgMMGl1TU5VZHDDYxIS3r0y_jJxrw2f61cGux-vuCz1hpYCxGtlrdLyjDUSfWd_NoNrpsA8Yd8RdkWzodoj3iOGBo2xamzVaHU-RuslECyGAqkoRJfmsOAFGCUmO1WKZ159dAbozI3SZ_-37N_4%3D)

Now that Speaker Gingrich is on board, I need to prove to him that I'm the real deal. To do so, I'm asking you to take action RIGHT NOW and [**chip in to my Emergency Response Fund.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSd9xQ4H8wcUn2195Mc_a9eaHlRA5UyWKolpuBj-Ehva0ZR83Qyd64GE5vrmIfnvAtJzp2kA4cxWTMH-DPPfgNl9omXQ6yHMRe6-UZkrpLhxKrn5NUs7Y5tOcQpcWpGVE5zAJRHt02BL33mWDqfJtVmpzIxoaqSYZs-J9OtTW1wZNNTCUCW_DNl0_YLKdexqRyLQiXFfW5Y9mPzvZSwPMxyEwYfKNv9r6bcRxkpR_7aaoXUmz2RAGNrHf7Era3pZzBXP2zSh4I5TYVomPr-8cmD_hOH8x-iCNhhBKnrrstgn3m3YUbiOiwmVzSTRincqCvnRqEAsLj0f4PyRExyZcndFpxnBKJ5X6EnPhwZF2m1sLcKoDOQCcQZ_RX-qj3cWPpVoInEZ43GFUnlti3OhdFiM%3D)

I want to show Speaker Gingrich the sheer number of Wisconsinites who are ready to fight for the values he and I have defended for years. I want to show we're ready to respond to any attack on what we believe. And I want to show him soon.

[I'M READY TO FIGHT FOR OUR VALUES](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSd9xQ4H8wcUn2195Mc_a9eaHlRA5UyWKolpuBj-Ehva0ZR83Qyd64GE5vrmIfnvAtJzp2kA4cxWTMH-DPPfgNl9omXQ6yHMRe6-UZkrpLhxKrn5NUs7Y5tOcQpcWpGVE5zAJRHt02BL33mWDqfJtVmpzIxoaqSYZs-J9OtTW1wZNTSlNCWWTm72QPKVCJUUt5DxR5KgMPFQi-nBKtG5uU3dQJSxnOr9KKTaZQpXbLcGgfmI_U0zRQKiDzSz65KXIjVtHEmdN-qTLmgR1xjmZ_4801cY20Dp5Mh7EmSjYNNBp02MpwFjCHqcWAxW7G25vDBMlW99cD_8n32BuOeDvdeY4DdDvRIMQR_Rend9N0bHhQhRbALwV1X0dBUlaz1AVf1dzmHHOfQGUxQD6J7sl_wg%3D)
---

The fact that Speaker Gingrich is supporting my campaign is further proof that I'm the only true conservative in this race. President Trump needs more fighters in the U.S. Senate, and you can count on me.

I hope you'll join Speaker Gingrich in supporting my big plans for Wisconsin, and show the nation that we're ready for anything.

-Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSUozEabMyS4_Gh4i_8GClFs0uWgyTHfvwKPgl9N4tW1I10H-g6X8PhCvQPaS6x0JlW0ejvjhCnfd1Ik1TSt9TOGrZooFI5qtjzVwmiHwuCSk98C0C3gvBHpDWdkB70Jq54GHrzRaA575wWOcFhkkrSK1rn8TLFRr9lYdNFNHHo0hwT16xmU5W0rlOcjqgqPdRtlxGbVcQDAP9cfQgJcz5aw5lqowV8qEdJ35MkfCXNAJyxlwx823ZhWRC_4Rf_j3KQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSR72zPAHMHjI1Fnx0ict5WsEkiVdBaEShlk3zM6do7zSjE_xJxuTOSfrNPdBcd1TJvSNLZFATEDkWN0WVSAkVSmZMFS5xx1hXi_ZgH8uHdGZZP-tXivh5JDzxYADpPpGsGg_vxzeKLdvF05mVG0VRSAVJ34xZ3uniNNmTDfnEBxT0vhrqDRa9QVehLgQl-RQjB32sRKpqHwFCD7aqcQiBGwkT0nHFF5CrnHca3GHM5mLMXfnBKSR_d4nYAb4jlY9uw%3D%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=v_lctNGduouaNXsO2DVBUN8RcaWzeA1eVkFZKcDI4PnnXl7vOvgPzH0z2pxJZPeKNT1i6A9xbcmj6dbsK8zhZpQ716v9R_9KN8ElLvJa5AhKDuOliM23GMeDQZvRSC-cklr6YXp5OKFTVBMcuryOJpy-Dsxn38Gwn1pCfcLtG-fb2HTPi0RJC2SWljYey4e8PiKMdJdftOusTsDzKCMKxgtnyLfSbkxM5Ga29GLxF-FHK7bPrXIGgjSu1xKRA_JM). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSVDEq5cbgKrxibL28u-QzRuSGqZRa8npersykGAXWKTmhV23kHBtLjH1V7mxXDftuXTewz2xvOS3R2F9m-8OSK9XkCtagaJh1Tx12I-DRBdNRhNV8wmVxS_gpeGjE7ib1UcZtwGHdoH-4dzLcFho5l_uX65j0KYlmf1IEHaSJIwsYpRVxTU0TTnYMqGj9SBh8-Wo-xEHhSCyCfYSpgtMrvnuUSNrvmQ8OF3mzjMtLziXi-_ZloVrCRMF5HzMCMWTHhd0yXyA7yOKwbqD1zpUAK1XKGIJu0OWKAr7WEd-it1AxXDbBpJFVhcJ-BwKoI5ZfY9EBTfk66WmkHlKQYNI9ocHF3-hcecxNNVNXvP7MIRM) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSVDEq5cbgKrxibL28u-QzRv5KNSnDvlOzH_ml5HWYjivtd_hT2p1ZDtEbV4OJQ3Bv0VxSLNUjCrO1NiBUIvVTnJtjLB2f7jri-KOTx89WcKX9E3FJLmqprV6PCHM1V4rvTzxr6r4r1OIAiCx6Yjxj8NvCE7eMqKJyFWlGruaBQ9-G-jnnq_Gt6JAM7eHiW1_jBHEe5YYCqLHF_K3gNeQe_pgGXYyBQJsaCL68c9Eka3fgd66_6eLY8CM11GzI_3gSZzoSE2egxhAa_XSGQJ6gUeUdsQ-gxV-Ghz9soFBpMAZclEv4fwHFHV7WtZ9gm_D0JvWnpFOXgU_u75Xoqrj_ugs1ZtYtXX649DfgdJ3-nW9) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSUozEabMyS4_Gh4i_8GClFs0uWgyTHfvwKPgl9N4tW1IAGw3xh6UvHGCa0L592xeemhQWFS-30TC1npAMnlSjTgSLeQJ8u2jXg1pHp6Pd53fQZ9M6EWlrc45harigmecRglRQfgp3Ihwpw-O94QgcQs1dqLktoOLms70zu_DmWRAyfY2HKeud6W8ax7Md-7XdO7mqWmvKcVWl9yg-85NDCUNOSXbGDx1WtrHXrtD_4vGdaiRSoAs3px62PsZu_3V1A%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSR72zPAHMHjI1Fnx0ict5WsEkiVdBaEShlk3zM6do7zSDU7XtDU-7COfuLOXJREtmO6pRmxbHmqjTAPCtIaxJoQrcNOVWLGXI1mujk4Pe5VxgD9N6_rF1_tZ6N1vroF8TUl_8hJ4gjxEUiAIxL3FdfKtbN_SszdvFla6YwM7lH92w09tTlG4q0-mA4cEp0bKirvjTHt-Ms23oVdppGPB2UU95wYDfVXwqGbVMqL0ET3STl_tgHq7GnqPn82ubolJTg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSQaebkaZSbQ2pfdEI_mjPvqIy6Qf7uJ8xpvSkXmvLNe9J-_pBb6P-Jkb0Hcq5FGxwz-OFpYElkSM8Q7rH0FJjX9y7vK3aR7iUDgAjoavco_TXD-gEIG5z1nSLbHMWf6OeRSPIbuTddJ3SNemkvX1Jys1QydS8egat6kL2FECV8xtFtXtq2_E1HcZ1A_HRAD-R7oFmWskh7c_uMmikqAj24A-JNt5O2Cn3JsqH2WavTovSd6tpDpXqCU1aOiy4m28yw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=gQQjl4tav82kx6sUlPfdSVDEq5cbgKrxibL28u-QzRt_XOPDXAuAJFgfG4dXi30BJG_5PE1mnKm4oIkw-eWmTSg4P5qh1C8qkp7pnaxMvjFOnDvaMewuQbCmm5XW78sc6_YyWv7atJILfJ7nQVwRkEzwAdUrcR6PUvrkaycc3EBWzlPHh_ZrrUEh8T4pXCTmzh10NsBs-UnON39ansZphBG9oSIe84wEjfzKhWqJ999mEZuuA-PLFTiaBjf0lNJyy2JQkNMedhjj2GklvMVKoRJNHHvI3t5VTcL-yKI-hNK7Qg9SPBYfL_fMsgdq7dvr8AuZ4StAAyuM-gSTY5vCYbmpzFxkh3yulnn9EOv9ck9nvZOpJ91KP6oLLLsqWqMFBNCmRrTfIUbIx37EzgujvQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=v_lctNGduouaNXsO2DVBUN8RcaWzeA1eVkFZKcDI4PnnXl7vOvgPzH0z2pxJZPeKNT1i6A9xbcmj6dbsK8zhZpQ716v9R_9KN8ElLvJa5AhKDuOliM23GMeDQZvRSC-cklr6YXp5OKFTVBMcuryOJpy-Dsxn38Gwn1pCfcLtG-fb2HTPi0RJC2SWljYey4e8PiKMdJdftOusTsDzKCMKxgtnyLfSbkxM5Ga29GLxF-FHK7bPrXIGgjSu1xKRA_JM) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4f53e5d514b41b4a630274ffbe2a843&_e=v_lctNGduouaNXsO2DVBUN8RcaWzeA1eVkFZKcDI4PnnXl7vOvgPzH0z2pxJZPeKNT1i6A9xbcmj6dbsK8zhZpQ716v9R_9KN8ElLvJa5AhKDuOliM23GMeDQZvRSC-cklr6YXp5OKFTVBMcuryOJpy-Dsxn38Gwn1pCfcLtG-fb2HTPi0RJC2SWljYey4e8PiKMdJdftOusTsDzKCMKxgtnyLfSbkxM5Ga29GLxF-FHK7bPrXIGgjSu1xKRA_JM) to unsubscribe. **Our July end-of-month deadline is tonight at midnight, and we 're falling short of where we need to be. **I just got off the phone with Jacky and she's not happy that we might miss this goal. [**Can you step up with a matched gift of $5 - or whatever you can - right away?**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd144/4fbb2af3/7982e1fe/5e8ca898/3353807761/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg0Ni1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk846-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: [New poll] the race is wide open
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We're in a great position to win.
#

Peter -
Siena College just released a new poll of our race, and we're in a great position to win.
Here's the topline: 42% of likely voters are still undecided. Despite the political and financial establishment's attempt to install a hand-picked candidate, **Zephyr is within striking distance of our opponents.**
With nine days until our next official fundraising deadline, we need to push harder -- all of us, together. So I am asking you to step up and help us:
**[Will you chip in $3 right now to support our voter outreach efforts? There are powerful people and wealthy interests who will see this poll and spend even more trying to stop us. Your donation will help us fight back.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e86/6e822e2f/1a6a0669/41724e4e/2664818404/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MzEtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180731-full")**
Peter, we have a winning message. We know that people want an independent Attorney General willing to stand up to corruption wherever it exists, and Zephyr is the only candidate in this race who is willing to do that.
She is the only candidate not taking corporate money, and all of our opponents are outspending us. Despite that, we are in a strong position to win because we have supporters like you standing with us.
Thank you for helping power this campaign. With an agenda centered on justice for working people and our grassroots strength, we are going to win.
All my best,
Dan Torres
Campaign Manager

name: Bob Menendez
subject: The truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:

You have no doubt heard the facts - Bob Hugin's views are out of touch with New Jersey families. His beliefs on equality and inclusion go against the very nature of what we stand for as a state.

But I know that won't stop Hugin and his team from doing everything they can to hide the truth including throwing more and more money to mislead New Jersey voters. We can't keep up with his spending, but with your help, we can keep telling voters the truth.

name: Senate Update 2018
subject: Lou Barletta wants to repeal the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6022/51dbcc2a/182ea2f5/3a695b7/444232676/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Team -- 2018 is all about health care.

The GOP has made it clear that they are waging a war on affordable health care, and we need to stop them. Congressional Republicans have tried and failed to repeal the Affordable Care Act multiple times already, which would take away health care from the millions of Americans who depend on it. As part of their anti-middle-class tax scheme, the GOP succeeded in repealing the individual mandate of the ACA, and now premiums are skyrocketing.

**_[We can't let this become the new normal -- donate now to send Bob Casey back to the Senate to keep fighting for affordable health care.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180731_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Every American should have access to quality, affordable health care: they should not go bankrupt paying for health care while struggling to put a roof over their loved ones' heads or food on the table. Bob will continue to fight to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security and work to ensure all Americans have affordable health care options, but he needs your help. The ACA has been narrowly upheld twice by the Supreme Court, and with Republicans trying to fill another seat on the bench with a judge picked by corporate special interests, it's never been more important to send Bob back to the Senate.

**We can 't let the GOP strip health care from millions of Americans, so we need to protect every Senate vote for quality, affordable care. name: Organizing HQ | Team Kaine
subject: [STRATEGY UPDATE] 98 days out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
As we move into the final stretch of this race, we wanted to share a quick update on our campaign strategy. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -

**We 've [got three months and six days to go between now and Election Day,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e35335a/3974544922/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+got+three+months+and+six+days+to+go+betw&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND") and we're not taking anything for granted in these last 98 days.** As we move into the final stretch of this race, we wanted to share a quick update on our campaign strategy.

**Right now, we 're focusing on:**

**Continuing to run a positive campaign, despite our opponent trying to drag us down.**
* When Tim faced off against Corey Stewart in their first debate, Corey waged personal attack after personal attack. But Tim stuck to the campaign's message of building a Virginia that works for all, because we know we don't need to fight dirty to win.
* [Chip in $25 to our ad fund and help us fight back against the GOP's attacks by spreading our positive campaign message >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e353359/3974544922/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+25+to+our+ad+fund+and+help+us+fi&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND")

**Connecting with voters in new and innovative ways.**
* A recent article in the Richmond Times-Dispatch mentioned that our campaign is "building a high-tech and high-touch voter-mobilization program" for the entire Democratic ticket. This program is helping us reach more voters than ever - and we're going to be ramping it up even more [over the next three months.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e353358/3974544922/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+over+the+next+three+months&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND")
* [Chip in $10 to help us give more organizers access to these innovative voter outreach tools >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e35335f/3974544922/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+10+to+help+us+give+more+organize&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND")

**Running a fully coordinated campaign with Democrats up and down the ticket.**
* Tim has been campaigning with our 11 Congressional candidates all across the Commonwealth this month, because we're not only working to re-elect Tim to the Senate - we want to elect as many Democrats throughout the Commonwealth as possible [in November.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e35335e/3974544922/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+in+November&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND")
* [Chip in $35 and help us make sure Democrats on every level have the resources they need to win >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e35335d/3974544922/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Chip+in+35+and+help+us+make+sure+Democra&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND")

**Organizing in every corner of Virginia.**
* Tim kicked this month off by traveling across the Commonwealth. He even helped open a few of the 20+ campaign offices that our dozens of organizers are working out of in communities all over Virginia. And our team isn't done growing yet.
* [Chip in $50 to help us open more campaign offices between now and Election Day >> ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e35335c/3974544922/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+50+to+help+us+open+more+campaign&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND")

This team has done great work so far, and we want to stay on track and make sure we keep performing well between now and Election Day.

**[Tonight is our July fundraising deadline, and we're at risk of falling short: We still have to raise $3,200 before midnight tonight.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e353353/3974544922/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Tonight+is+our+July+fundraising+deadline&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND") [Chip in any amount now and help us reach our goal before time runs out >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e353352/3974544922/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+Chip+in+any+amount+now+and+help+us+reach&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c6/3e0906/6e6156f9/3e353351/3974544922/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND&source=20180731_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-Strategy-LDND")

| | | **This. Is. IT.**

We're less than 100 days to Election Day. This is when we need you with us.

**_[Help Martin fight back against national Republicans and the Koch brothers over the next 98 days!->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Help+Martin+fight+back+against+national+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9&source=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9&refcode=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9")_** **[DONATE NOW>>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. Normally, the last 100 days of an election are when we see dark-money groups and national Republicans spend big to energize their base.

But this year, the Koch brothers are ALREADY spending against Martin, and the GOP has contacted over 20 million voters so far!

**That 's why we launched our FIRST television ad of the campaign yesterday, and we need your help to keep it on the air after it starts airing.**

**_[With 98 days until Election Day, we need to know you're standing with Martin in the fight to re-elect him.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+With+98+days+until+Election+Day+we+need+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9&source=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9&refcode=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9")_**
**[SUPPORT MARTIN TODAY](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+SUPPORT+MARTIN+TODAY&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9&source=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9&refcode=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9")** As Democrats, we pride ourselves on our grassroots organizing. But Republicans and the Koch brothers are already in the game, and it's clear they are willing to spend whatever it takes to defend their Senate and House majorities.

**The GOP knows the blue wave is coming for them this November, and that 's why they are throwing hundreds of millions of dollars into keeping control of Congress.**

**_[That's why we need your help to fight the Republican outreach machine. Contribute now so Martin has what it takes to fight off GOP attacks over the next 98 days and keep his ad on the air!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-++if+consfirstname++consfirstname++t+else&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9&source=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9&refcode=MH_EM_FR_60DAT_180731_1_9")_**

name: Kelly, Molly
subject: flip NH blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
Our most important fundraising deadline of the campaign is at midnight tonight, friends. But right now, we need to raise another $3,500 if we're going to flip New Hampshire blue.
I'm not accepting the corporate special interest money that's fueling Chris Sununu's campaign. But that means I don't stand a chance against him and his deep-pocketed right-wing allies without the help of this grassroots team.
**If we're going to take back the corner office and defeat the Trump/Sununu agenda, I'm counting on your immediate donation:**[Please, will you give $5 or more right now- every dollar you can - to help us close this gap and flip New Hampshire blue?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48ca/d0ce7de/5111c4f3/9cd32b0/1272193234/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNzctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk77-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
I can't do this without you, friends. Thank you.
Molly

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Supporters of Molly Kelly email list, please click here.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48ca/d0ce7de/5111c4f3/9cd32bf/1272193234/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://mollykelly.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Patty Murray
subject: From a yard sale to the powerful EMILY's List community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ebd/24c69fd9/26a40a0c8/18850ba6/3650017165/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact&source=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact")
---

Peter,

I had a lot to learn when I started out in politics. One of my first fundraisers was a yard sale.

My whole family pitched in, but we actually lost money giving things away and handing out cookies. I was willing to do the work, but I didn't have the resources.

That all changed when EMILY's List got involved.

I'll never forget the feeling of this community having my back -- it kept me going all the way to the United States Senate.

This community has done the same thing for hundreds of other candidates since then, and we can be the difference for the hundreds more pro-choice Democratic women on the ballot this year -- including two women who can flip the Senate.

**[Donate $3 to help reach EMILY's List's $300,000 End-of-Month goal to support even more candidates like me.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ebd/24c69fd9/26a40a0c8/18850ba7/3650017165/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+reach+EMILYs+Lists+3000&utm_campaign=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact&source=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact")**

I decided to run for the Senate after watching Anita Hill testify on Capitol Hill about how Clarence Thomas had sexually harassed her.

I remember watching an all-male panel on the Senate Judiciary Committee questioning her, and wondering why none of the members were asking the questions I would have asked.

I knew yelling at the TV wouldn't fix it. So I decided to run.

And whether they were inspired to run after the shocking election of Donald Trump or Republicans' callous attempts to repeal Obamacare, thousands of women have stories a lot like mine.

With the support of EMILY's List behind them, they'll be able to overcome the put-downs and make it through tough campaigns just like I did.

That's the power of this community, and it's fueled by meeting goals like this one.

**Donate $3 to help raise $300,000 by the end of the month so that we can elect more pro-choice Democratic women to the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-July-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ebd/24c69fd9/26a40a0c8/18850ba0/3650017165/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitJulyGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact&source=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact")**

Thank you,

Patty Murray
U.S. Senator, Washington State

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ebd/24c69fd9/26a40a0c8/18850ba1/3650017165/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact&source=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact")**

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ebd/24c69fd9/26a40a0c8/18850ba2/3650017165/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact&source=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ebd/24c69fd9/26a40a0c8/18850ba3/3650017165/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact&source=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ebd/24c69fd9/26a40a0c8/18850bdc/3650017165/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact&source=WQEFES80N_digital_email_20180731_EOMMurray_inact"). name: Emma Carl
subject: FW: Closing July
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter \- We're only a few short hours away from the end-of-month fundraising deadline, and want I to make sure you saw Abigail's note below. The number we reach at midnight tonight will set the stage for the final few months of the campaign and right now, we're still $2,283 short of our goal.

With your support, we'll be able to continue to contacting voters, coordinating volunteers, and spreading the word about campaign to bring responsive and accountable leadership back to VA07. [Can you pitch in and ensure we're able to reach every voter?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ekZV_RGTDO9QVVQu5KXW_chN4aQP1kf9Th6YfX3pBw=/U52oHwVGmHwrzBOTOfsHDWdO-xFDk70AEnRa2NWRfaU=?refcode=julyeom2)

Thank you again for your support of our campaign, and together, we will make an impact in November!

-Emma
Finance Director, Spanberger for Congress

\---------- Original message ----------

From: Abigail Spanberger
Date: Friday, July 31, 2018
Subject: Important updates: Please read
To: Peter Willis < dpwillis67@gmail.com>

Peter,

As the past several weeks have shown, our campaign continues to make tremendous strides in Virginia's 7th District.

From our ratings changes to our 2,000+ volunteers knocking on doors and calling voters, our campaign continues to draw attention, build excitement, and show that **this race is winnable.**

**But we 're not letting the great progress we've made distract us from reality. **This race is by no means in the bag. No matter what the experts are telling us, we're still looking at an uphill battle, and we need **everyone on board** if we're going to claim victory in November.

Today marks the end of July -- and the start of the final push for this campaign. This race is going to be unlike any the 7th District has ever seen, and it's essential that we hit every fundraising deadline to ensure we have the resources to endure. Right now, we are still $8,537 short of our July goal. **[Can you contribute now to help us close our July on top?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ekZV_RGTDO9QVVQu5KXW_chN4aQP1kf9Th6YfX3pBw=/U52oHwVGmHwrzBOTOfsHDWdO-xFDk70AEnRa2NWRfaU=?refcode=julyeom1)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ekZV_RGTDO9QVVQu5KXW_chN4aQP1kf9Th6YfX3pBw=/U52oHwVGmHwrzBOTOfsHDWdO-xFDk70AEnRa2NWRfaU=?refcode=julyeom1)

We need to finish the month strong so we can finish the race even stronger, {{FirstName,DefaultTo=Friend}}. **And we can 't do it without you.**

Thank you so much for your support.

-Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ekZV_RGTDO9QVVQu5KXW_chN4aQP1kf9Th6YfX3pBw=/T05q9yWv77T2u7unfC8NnnIo9-7QS73txzIq8woKWHw=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ekZV_RGTDO9QVVQu5KXW_chN4aQP1kf9Th6YfX3pBw=/-U5gjT7RWd6ceoXfRXPG92GPaGcOb9_ZzfDWsGfgbSM=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ekZV_RGTDO9QVVQu5KXW_chN4aQP1kf9Th6YfX3pBw=/elB0UOE0IrOnMgTthQHzJadJqUFDQGM5ZDfjQRNJCJE=).

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I'm not exaggerating (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Here's a thought that should get us all fired up. **Thanks to the passage of the Fair Districts Amendments, Democrats in November have a number of competitive seats that we can win.** My team and I have been working day and night campaigning in Florida. We have critical races up and down the ticket. [**You can help us by pitching in $5 to fund our Get Out the Vote efforts.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f63/622b7b5b/1c04385b/307b9957/4067076306/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180731z?refcode=dwse180731z_m&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f63/622b7b5b/1c04385b/307b9956/4067076306/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzMxeiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180731z?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse180731z_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f63/622b7b5b/1c04385b/307b9956/4067076306/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzMxeiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180731z?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse180731z_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f63/622b7b5b/1c04385b/307b9956/4067076306/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzMxeiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180731z?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse180731z_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f63/622b7b5b/1c04385b/307b9949/4067076306/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzMxeiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180731z?refcode=dwse180731z_m_other&refcode2=861769")** Right now, we have an opportunity to do more than stop Donald Trump. We can elect enough Democrats to take back the House and the Senate. **But right-wing Super PACs are in damage-control mode. They are dumping cash into close races and pulling out all the stops to protect their majority.** That's why we can't get complacent. Together, we need to finish an important task. We have to defeat the party that helped an unqualified bigot rise to prominence. [**This is a big deal, so we need a big response. Please give $5 to fuel our Get Out the Vote efforts. Let 's take the majority back.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f63/622b7b5b/1c04385b/307b9957/4067076306/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180731z?refcode=dwse180731z_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you, Debbie

subject: Could you contribute $50, $100, $250, or whatever you can right now?
body:

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c1f9cc8b29fc4e6c8a3547a41d425e69&_e=p7FkhP-knLjDpjU_Rj5TnlmrnIldhlYV5qiOFUDojrwp0FzC2sGA3uxrRbs1KuNZG3VP4KK4I5zIOTC2KelaMoxzRgCaupBarK4DIkNW1hS1RIOyjlNm0BPPwx7kD59qoFE_i2DA91gnK9rkRNQmqDH0m0diCy2o5N4Q66HYWxH2TPJfsOfFwaJHWidT6jEVwNkNkR3SEhrJ25NoQLsm-gh09qsndPRgPEE_ZJ_72qFHRETWqUGaotQkRJBtbpmy). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c1f9cc8b29fc4e6c8a3547a41d425e69&_e=qRdk0JdALY516FhR9VJlH80_YijIZhcKYAXR6zzNr96vT0a04QQXjdPT6OW2cSg7QSLGV04krcoBSwi_d_QYGvTHDyhd-gWldd6dmHUKRTsUR9QC4IjFV3afmQhn1zyb_mcc9HXENAs6L2gGnhTpqbhJ6IUhOG_OXclOe6P_4UR2ft2i2760NNUZvp7RTytqaWcxff5oPfpD_j6926mobIBMOxakLOyioqQpcfOsM9f5Nifymzr21Rm04GqmigbA7tGf7KfIhiS75HUOtG-1dI16zWohLHYGxmtQOkHUaUpFzBxy8znKhPUIDnd52ifH97kJ6YUEwbjVbtWXGoFhecGnrBohgJh8mVRxPD_yphNemhTKnCcnvs01G3Mb-p78) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c1f9cc8b29fc4e6c8a3547a41d425e69&_e=qRdk0JdALY516FhR9VJlH80_YijIZhcKYAXR6zzNr95NVtD1sDFy_6zKQEYE24_gsS8vwsz5-57kOHUPJXbXpmBai93xJj_tqNkC0s1ZmrxxhoGAj-pa7sdMFx_IVYgVPlNZrg7K-dOrXxZwzgcCGtyROZrE4-eg-3KdHW-ByYU43DTlNZnlaMRgT4eSkwmiCtuHDOwIbFmv1s05xMLHUnb1FaFDJkLGknVR8dh9F-pgrpWaFQAAX9UZMdz5s1sIO3rql_Bb2VUnvnwJxOSs5kiJP6Gr9Gb8-mhz8xlDYAhjQtpYis-NITU6O3fAPr_rFLglOKWoReFnCHgdy5aCeigOzaymuFt_csf3J0fX8wRsvDt4WMjcCHpJ57R8dAc9) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. clean_body: I just checked in on our end-of-month goals and it looks like we still have $8,091 left to go! Friend, I just checked in on our end-of-month goals and it looks like we still have $8,091 left to go! I can’t stress enough how important this deadline is and we MUST reach our goals to succeed so we can beat Senator Baldwin this fall. Remember, friend, we only have until midnight tonight to make it count. Can you step up now? I know we can put up that red brick wall to stop the blue wave and deliver the Wisconsin Way to Washington. But we have to work together now. I’m counting on you, Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, we’re approaching a critical point in our campaign. It’s our LAST end-of-month fundraising deadline before the August 14th primary, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching the goal we set for July. We have $23,211 left to go and friend, I need your help today to make sure we fill this gap. Will you make an emergency donation? First Name:** Friend Email: Status: NOT ACCEPTED | I'm just going to be honest with you, friend. Senator Baldwin and the political elite are outraising AND outspending us! They've already spent millions to make Wisconsin a blue state again. And with DC special interests wanting to protect the status quo, we're facing heat on BOTH sides of the aisle. We HAVE to make sure our campaign is prepared to take all that they're throwing at us. To do that, we NEED to reach our goals. Can you chip in today? Please, Friend, let's make this month a good one so we can head into the primary with confidence. If you can chip in today, even just $25, it would be a big help in bringing our fight straight to Washington: ** Thank you, friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Greg Stanton

body:

name: Team Ryan
subject: Seven days left! (OH-12 Special Election)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
The GOP is desperate to hold onto this seat -- they just dumped another $250,000 into the race, and Donald Trump has even tweeted about support of the flailing Republican candidate. | |
---
Folks, With just ONE WEEK to go before the special election in Ohio's 12th District, two of the most reliable non-partisan analysts in the country are calling the race a **TOSS-UP.** Sabato's Crystal Ball says:_ "__Democratic enthusiasm and special election results that have often broken in their favor...The Republican 's PA-18 nightmare certainly has a chance to repeat itself."_ And Cook Political Report says: _"Democrats' superior intensity, particularly in a mid-summer race that hasn't gotten much national attention, could easily erase that gap [in the polls]."_ **We have ONE WEEK LEFT. We've got to do everything we can to help Danny O'Connor fuel his campaign to flip this seat. **[Can you chip in today to help him win in OH-12 and contribute to our efforts to take back the house?](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f3/1690749024/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em20180731_ratings_30") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Tim Ryan and Danny O'Connor:_ [Express Donate: $5 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f3/1690749024/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em20180731_ratings_30") [Express Donate: $10 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f3/1690749024/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em20180731_ratings_30") [Express Donate: $25 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f3/1690749024/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em20180731_ratings_30") [Express Donate: $50 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f2/1690749024/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em2010731_ratings_30") [Express Donate: $100 >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f3/1690749024/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em20180731_ratings_30") [Or, donate another amount](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f3/1690749024/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em20180731_ratings_30") [Want to help another way? Sign up to join the Virtual Phone Bank and call OH-12 voters from anywhere in the country >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f5/1690749024/VEsO/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/oconnorforcongress/event/7878/") The GOP is desperate to hold onto this seat -- they just dumped another $250,000 into the race, and Donald Trump has even tweeted his support of the flailing Republican candidate. Meanwhile, Democrat Danny O'Connor is connecting with voters of all stripes. His mom was a teacher and his dad worked at a nonprofit. His family taught him the value of service and giving back. He wants to protect Social Security from cuts -- a promise his Republican opponent has REFUSED to make. **Early voting has already started, and in a tight race like this, it 's crucial that Danny get his message out to undecided voters. **[Can you chip in any amount today to help get Danny over the finish line, and support our efforts to take back the House?](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f3/1690749024/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em20180731_ratings_30") [Chip In](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f3/1690749024/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_dannyoconnor?refcode=em20180731_ratings_30") Thank you, \-- Team Ryan P.S. If you can't donate, or want to help another way, [please join Danny's Virtual Phone Bank and make calls to OH-12 voters from anywhere in the country.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f5/1690749024/VEsHBA/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/oconnorforcongress/event/7878/")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f4/1690749024/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f7/1690749024/VEsHBg/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f6/1690749024/VEsHAQ/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f9/1690749024/VEsHAA/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")

Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a920a/5486deaa/294d5a70/dcc41f4/1690749024/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

| **As the proud son of a World War II veteran, I believe one of the most important things we can do is support the brave individuals who serve, or have served, our nation.** That’s why in my State of the State Address I asked the Legislature to approve a Veterans’ Package, which my Administration and newly reconstituted Veterans’ Advisory Council put forward. **I’m happy to report that on many fronts, we were successful.** Until this year, Vermont was the only state in the region that did not offer tuition entitlements to those who serve in the their state’s National Guard. This put our Guard at a disadvantage when trying to recruit, and as a result, many Vermonters would join guards in other states. **I’m pleased to say, this year, we were able to pass legislation that will change this, and Vermont will join the rest of the nation by providing tuition free college for our guard members.** Additionally, we know those who have served are some of the most talented, productive and reliable members of the workforce. **This year I asked lawmakers to pass -- and I was pleased to sign -- first-in-the-nation licensing reciprocity for high-need fields.** This means, in industries like healthcare and the construction trades, **we will automatically recognize military training and license veterans who served in those fields in the military.** This will be an important recruiting tool as we look to attract more workers to our state, and it acknowledges their skills and military training. **I also asked the Legislature to exempt military pensions from the state income tax.** Unfortunately, the Legislature would not fund this, but, rest assured,**I will push again next year to eliminate this tax for those who put everything on the line.** Sincerely,

Phil Scott

**P.S. - I would be honored to have your support in the Republican Primary on August 14th so I can continue this work to thank our Veterans. **

---

body:
Congress is better because Tom O'Halleran is here serving Arizona families.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633850/1a8421e1/1a52a6be7/489c1e66/457888589/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")

Friend, _I 'm writing you today to ask you to support my friend and colleague, Tom O'Halleran._ Congress is better because Tom is here serving Arizona families. Since coming to Washington, Tom has demonstrated that he's a true public servant -- a voice for Arizona who believes that our government can and should make life better for all of us. **It 's critical that Tom wins re-election in November, friend.** _**[Will you make a donation to his campaign before his end-of-month deadline tonight so he can keep fighting for Arizona? ](http://action.tomohalleran. Working alongside Tom in Congress, I've seen firsthand that he comes to Washington every day determined to make life better for families in his district. He's an advocate for improving health care in rural communities. He's been on the front lines demanding that the Trump Administration be held accountable to taxpayers for its excesses.

**But Tom was recently named the most endangered Democrat in the House, so his re-election is far from assured.** He's depending on the [**continued support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.31_b2_jkiii_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") of grassroots Democrats like you to win and keep AZ-01 blue.

With your help, Tom will keep serving Arizona in Congress. [**Please join me and lend him your support today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.31_b2_jkiii_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Joe Kennedy III

Friends,
We know what we can accomplish working hard the Virginia way--Medicaid expansion, investments in green energy, criminal justice reform, and so much more. Virginians do what's right, not what's easy--and I can think of no better person who espouses those principles than my friend, Sen. Tim Kaine.
If we're going to end gridlock in Washington and start helping Virginia families, we need to do everything we can to reelect Tim to the Senate. But right now, a hateful, Trump-endorsed opponent stands in his way, a man who'll rubber-stamp dangerous policies that hurt our country.
**Virginia is no place for hate or fear-mongering --we work hard to make a better future for _all _Virginians. But right now, Tim needs to raise another $5,526 to hit his big end-of-month goal and fight back against his extremist opponent. Will you give $5 today to reelect Tim, stop hateful bigotry, and move Virginia forward? **

## NICHOLSON FACT CHECK
---
|
# **Nicholson Opposed Trump in 2016 Primary**
### _Nicholson Also Hired A Team Critical Of President Trump And The Trump White House _

While the Nicholson campaign tries to undermine proven conservative Leah Vukmir's strong support for President Trump, it must be clear that Kevin Nicholson himself was a Marco Rubio donor during the 2016 Republican primary.

**After Kevin Nicholson donated to Marco Rubio’s presidential campaign, he did nothing to help Donald Trump in 2016, sided with Steve Bannon against President Trump in 2017 and then surrounded himself with the aides who directed leading campaigns and spending millions against President Trump.**

**Leah Vukmir is the only candidate in this race who has stood strongly with President Trump consistently, even[recording an ad](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0b12608b412a4b05b45769b1052fd83e&_e=VPe2uaIKPGNM3jCuSWch_VHUtkwEfeb-Lp-3RQAStkeG3C421BlTpDxQkBjVSGEG-OYLY8BzxXTeMCY-nFqkzKZk3ngszMAxkYnVwL7kmb0OlucA7rcDagnOV6tDrQUoU4HSkLQfZ_pSHdfzph3EE-KJNSE-TaMQ_cnCQ34fdAV4qeN7sBSL0IG2I-15l_ltSZ3q8rsgnbt_uPivRI0s1kCmw3C0pwYPH2G09CPgd0qKVFPOWLVZFiJKgxs4luBE) supporting him during the most difficult days of his campaign.

Meanwhile, Kevin Nicholson was nowhere to be found.

BACKGROUND ...
On November 11, 2015, Mr. Kevin M. Nicholson donated $250 to Marco Rubio’s presidential campaign. **([Federal Election Commission](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0b12608b412a4b05b45769b1052fd83e&_e=VPe2uaIKPGNM3jCuSWch_XMnlN9um15W66rjqcUmVf6ABh50eldWCm_9DUVGKUT0_nchWzcBjdmlVQDAFHvdRyZiB6REZUnLFGY4bEBLIvgRG6wEqWlVBs9nKmB0jMVgYgSxjkytvUEKKcgj5Eamxsja2mI68_NQP83NoFYJBfF-ofjxZGHcQBLwRX0NwKExtRLJ9YCHlX2gaJ5g1MxLJUraeWKV0ophqKRmXJ8BYKzu0HZPtBpr1ClSaUOwB1RJ4rmzzgNVxE0URjkzdTGFvn5PPE2VAJJILUqPs103bUFAbhyfI9N5TJ4LITs2619ZnhnEjyyrratRhm9pyuK_w1OJCD8c2hV2nMaI0hYy1wSkU47zk_UZhL-jw6UYZqAfjvK_XmoDe64YAojNCRA_XoR9JVPNWXn99KWbpSg8MspTg7sbJ3dLUYet59jcaAbGAB-Wc_OukcmXD5VTOQSs0uwR3MMfTbbOxz88w4y1cHg%3D), Accessed, 07/31/18)

| **In 2017, Kevin Nicholson’s top spokesperson penned an op-ed that was highly critical of President Trump and the Trump White House. **“Mr. President — Be transparent. Get control of your message. We need you answering questions and speaking for yourself. You control the message, so start delivering it.” ([The Hill](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0b12608b412a4b05b45769b1052fd83e&_e=U5fz1heX-a1CV04_gBMnCYWtdlJm86LAWVxjbF-jCKg4HpirkuiXruphiewboiy2f5pBJQa79poJARtbx0urs_Tu2GJvunvAP40XGCrmYa9tU8DUJ3F3EA5cuhEOyBWeqMGw-HWpJVjUhoGG50Qc-B3XsQC5I_hEldOfCXh_MAnSLYAo901z_Bc-pabrzsGOZC0eltXJXQ8Jev3Hr1kWzNNmzOLemmi1iWvzvujTCI-2GrQrLbCA-sLoErA0uwOpRI-0kgAkRG5fvOwiO2nmalhUjAlw_oCHdDm2rf3ANXwbl3ZcpNFgkggIM82hOnCAKde8fh91JahiO1Df0plnwbyH4AabeEMXxxxzv4at4d2yMOihGJ7iFcBD1E63UHfK), 05/19/17)

**In 2016, Kevin Nicholson’s top aide, Jeff Roe, said Donald Trump would be a down-ballot disaster. **"Donald Trump’s nomination would be a down-ballot disaster so bad that “it could be a situation where we’d have to rename our party.” ([Politico](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0b12608b412a4b05b45769b1052fd83e&_e=VPe2uaIKPGNM3jCuSWch_XKdRnXiGMUNcSmlb4D06kwUTxmqOpe8Jq4NqCx_0hH510qlg9LuoV7DP3rQZQMNzVKD-mYXJkAmUJAk7Kxm8RARqLL3UwWULlUHiA5LAl0ll8haVZGBK752NDBegifJEjrjcID41jhIcPl7soSKFVAaI3euKDzNJRzJMfAEk0yBgN6WZZEpwBp5ecHf0QdmH0MlajYI0H9GaRFzkyoJTgFR14p06IGvPkZ2KNcb0Oagk5DmOUdBwdMBRRwyt-KtlpR_MnJgcwImKPYpBXJ4SoEXT3GOF8pVuz2IXX9HuyPi3i65BceJbuxQYZ7IHItiBw%3D%3D), 04/20/16)

**In 2016, David McIntosh, the president of the Club for Growth who is spending millions against Wisconsin conservative Leah Vukmir said President Trump is a not really a conservative. **“The Club for Growth isn’t letting up in a heavy advertising campaign aimed at taking down Donald Trump, the front-runner for the Republican presidential nomination.” ([The Hill](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0b12608b412a4b05b45769b1052fd83e&_e=U5fz1heX-a1CV04_gBMnCdqiC2YuPynTy2ewGMHSUa_FczhL2x9LPLZbjavx3LgbjJ19fTke0OjaYW981qDIIrMWvvMk3ZY0QMek7qmr7pqB8FoGHa50DozlIystuXlJLzU3AuPM9qdy0o-fzDBOLLXfDHxG2kHrCzlz2DQhcsuxdZ0tH-21d3q70j_WVP0yJ9c61ojS1s-eV0nvJGnKYfPZEnzoo-9KUVLc1f47kzPUqqGX7MzjI09LMcfoVVKWOZsk1_ihF9vrQctgHi-J2AGCtgj2mKmL27DUTJ9xt__I8-KbAiDXRM7C_qng0nDhCmbD27tAxKHirnzb0OL8yw%3D%3D), 03/11/16)

This election will go a long way in shaping how North Carolina moves forward in the coming years. My election in 2016 was phase one -- breaking the majority is phase two.

We can make North Carolina a top 10 educated state by 2025. We can create good-paying jobs that put more money in the pockets of hardworking North Carolinians. We can create a North Carolina where people are healthier and live more abundant and purposeful lives.

But our progress in the coming years depends on our success in November.

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: a bit behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
From the nomination of Judge Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court to President Trump's blatant favoritism for Vladimir Putin and the interests of the Russian Federation, it's been a busy month.
Ensuring that the Supreme Court preserves our fundamental rights and protecting our country from foreign interference has my undivided attention, and I have admittedly been less focused on fundraising.
But we still have an important deadline tonight and we've fallen a bit behind. The truth is, I really need your help.
[**Can you please make a $3 donation today? Our donations are behind where they were in both May and June, so we have some ground to make up. Anything you can give helps.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0d9/2a380d31/c0b2ccf/f1bff6/3729771849/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDczMV9FT00zXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180731_EOM3_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
I'm so incredibly grateful to have you on this team, and I'm thankful that you and I are in this together.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Hi there, From the nomination of Judge Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court to President Trump's blatant favoritism for Vladimir Putin and the interests of the Russian Federation, it's been a busy month. Ensuring that the Supreme Court preserves our fundamental rights and protecting our country from foreign interference has my undivided attention, and I have admittedly been less focused on fundraising. But we still have an important deadline tonight and we've fallen a bit behind. The truth is, I really need your help. "" I'm so incredibly grateful to have you on this team, and I'm thankful that you and I are in this together. With every good wish, Senator Maggie Hassan ""

name: betofortexas.com
subject: We’ll beat Cruz the right way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
#
From the very beginning, political insiders told us that Beto could never win without taking money from corporations or special interests. Without that money, they said our campaign would never raise enough to be competitive against Ted Cruz.[
](https://act.betofortexas.com/go/14?refcode=em20180731&t=1&akid=2064%2E444211%2E6_pWKx)
That’s why we’ve made such an effort to raise money online: so we can be 100% people-powered. When we send you an email like this one, it’s because Beto wants to beat Ted Cruz, but he wants to do it the _right_ way.[
](https://act.betofortexas.com/go/14?refcode=em20180731&t=2&akid=2064%2E444211%2E6_pWKx)
To beat Ted Cruz in a state as large as Texas, we need to hit our funding goals every single month. And right now, we’re $5,721 short for the end of July.[
](https://act.betofortexas.com/go/14?refcode=em20180731&t=3&akid=2064%2E444211%2E6_pWKx)
[**Can you contribute $3****today to reach Beto’s goal? Donations we collect from emails like this one will determine if we have what we need to win. Every month matters.**](https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180731&amount=3&t=4&akid=2064%2E444211%2E6_pWKx)
Each contribution not only ensures we have the resources to compete, but that we are sending a message to the political insiders about the way campaigns _should_ be run. To everyone who has given, THANK YOU for making sure we can reach every Texas voter.[
](https://act.betofortexas.com/go/14?refcode=em20180731&t=5&akid=2064%2E444211%2E6_pWKx)
Team Beto
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180731&amount=3&t=6&akid=2064%2E444211%2E6_pWKx)**

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2064%2E444211%2E6_pWKx). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

body:
We're reaching out one last time and asking you to chip in before midnight because we're so much closer to reaching our goal than we thought - but we could still fall short. --------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -

We're reaching out one last time and asking you to [chip in before midnight](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12c0/3e0906/6e71e186/3e353426/2200041298/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180731_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-last-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+chip+in+before+midnight&utm_campaign=20180731_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-last-LDND&source=20180731_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-last-LDND") because we're so much closer to reaching our goal than we thought - _but we could still fall short._

subject: Emailing to ask for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | It's been an exhausting few weeks for all of us, so I'm going to keep this quick. [**I 'm asking you to contribute $5 to help us hit our end of month goal of $25,000.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f60/622b7b5b/1c3abcbb/307b9946/3624210261/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726f?refcode=dwse180726f_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Why do I need your help?
* Because I have 5 opponents, who are actively raising money to defeat me.
* Because Republicans, the Trump administration, and the Koch brothers are on the attack.
* Because the general election is only 98 days away.

No matter your reason for giving, your support is crucial to this campaign. I'll continue to fight for South Florida families through every attack. **Now, I need your help.** [**This is our last end of month goal before the primary. If we don 't hit our goal, we'll have to scale back our efforts. Give just $5, or whatever you can, so we can keep fighting the good fight.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f60/622b7b5b/1c3abcbb/307b9946/3624210261/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726f?refcode=dwse180726f_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thanks for your support, Debbie Sent from my iPad. Sorry for any typos.
---

|
---
